This is not just a design role.

Translate written content into clean, visually appealing layouts

Ensure clear user flow (easy navigation, strong call-to-action placement)

Optimize spacing, readability, and structure

Create a modern, calm, professional look and feel

Implement SEO basics (titles, meta descriptions, page structure)

Make revisions based on feedback

Strong attention to detail

Reliable communication and turnaround

Experience with coaching, healthcare, or wellness brands

Basic SEO knowledge

Ability to suggest improvements, not just follow instructions

We will provide:



All written content

Clear structure and direction

Examples of style and layout



You will focus on:

???? Design

???? Layout

???? Execution

Layout and design quality

Spacing and readability

Attention to detail

Ability to follow direction

title: Growth Partner — Financial Trading Platform ($750/mo + Uncapped Commission)
description:
Here's the updated listing. Post on OnlineJobs.ph, 
, and Upwork.

JOB TITLE:

Growth Partner — Financial Trading Platform ($750/mo + Uncapped Commission)

TYPE OF EMPLOYMENT:

Part-time



JOB DESCRIPTION:



I run The Capitol Dossier — a financial intelligence platform that delivers options trade alerts backed by congressional trading data, dark pool flows, insider filings, and prediction markets. $97/month subscription sold through Whop. The product is live, the site is live, the checkout works. I need someone who can generate paying subscribers.

This is a long-term role, not a one-off project. If you produce, this becomes your highest-paying client.

This is NOT a VA role. NOT content creation. NOT customer support. This is sales and partnership development. You are judged on revenue, not hours.



YOUR JOB:



Get paying subscribers. The strategy is yours — but what works best is pitching owners of existing paid trading communities on Whop, 
, and
 on adding our intelligence feed as a premium layer inside their community. Whop splits revenue automatically. One deal equals ongoing recurring subscribers.

You can also recruit affiliates, pitch newsletter operators, run outreach campaigns, or anything else that puts paying subscribers on the board. I don't micromanage the method. I care about the result.



COMPENSATION:



$750/month base paid weekly ($187.50 every Friday via Wise). Plus 20% recurring commission on every subscriber you bring in. Commission is tracked via your unique referral link and paid monthly.

The math: 50 subscribers = $970/month in recurring commission on top of your $750 base. That's $1,720/month and growing every month because subscribers keep paying.

This is a long-term position. If you're producing, there is no end date and no cap on what you earn.



REQUIREMENTS:



You MUST have sold digital subscriptions, SaaS products, trading memberships, info products, or online courses before. Not physical products. Not phone plans. Digital products sold online.

You MUST be comfortable on platforms like Whop, 
,
, X, Reddit, or similar. If you've never used these, this isn't the right role.



You MUST write fluent, professional English.



YOUR APPLICATION MUST INCLUDE:



The specific digital product or service you sold. How many customers or subscribers you generated. The timeframe. What platforms and channels you used. If your application doesn't include these specifics, I will not respond.

Do NOT apply if you are a general VA, social media manager, or content creator. I need someone who has generated paying customers for a digital product.



TRIAL PERIOD:



First two weeks are a trial. If there are no paying subscribers or active sales pipeline by week two, we part ways. If you're producing, you stay and your commission compounds.



WAGE/SALARY: $750/month + commission



DESIRED NO. OF HOURS PER WEEK: 20



BUSINESS OR CONTACT NAME: The Capitol Dossier

title: Looking for 2 Rock Star SEO Experts to join our team. HIRING NOW!
description:
Are you experienced at SEO?



We are seeking 2 rock star EXPERIENCED and results-driven SEO Specialist to join our digital marketing agency. You’ll be responsible for creating and executing SEO strategies that increase search rankings, drive website traffic, and generate qualified leads. You'll also document your process and check the work of teammates who will assist under your direction.



You must stay current on industry best practices and algorithm updates (think Julian Goldie, Matt Diggity, Craig Campbell) and be excited about using tools like AI and automation to increase results and save time. We believe in working SMART!



This is a full-time position. You should understand Local SEO, standard on-page SEO, keyword strategy, technical SEO, internal linking, and backlink strategies. You must also be skilled at identifying rankable content ideas based on domain authority, competition levels, and search intent.



RESPONSIBILITIES:



-- Develop and implement SEO strategies to increase organic visibility, traffic, and conversions

-- Conduct keyword research using tools like SEMRush, SERanking, Google Search Console, and Ahrefs to build topical maps

-- Analyze SERPs and competitor sites to identify keyword gaps and opportunities

-- Use AI tools to help create content that aligns with search intent

-- Write or optimize blog posts, landing pages, and metadata

-- Create and maintain internal linking structures based on site hierarchy and topic relationships

-- Use the WordPress block editor to publish and optimize content

-- Optimize Google Business Profiles, including categories, services, products, NAP consistency, and geotagged photos

-- Build citations and perform basic local link building

-- Analyze performance with GA4, GSC, and SEMRush, providing recommendations for dev teams or writers

-- Conduct site audits to find and fix technical SEO issues (speed, indexing, mobile-friendliness, Core Web Vitals)

-- Track backlinks and identify outreach opportunities in GSC, Ahrefs, or similar tools

-- Conduct outreach to website owners for backlink placements and guest posts

-- Use automation and scraping tools to scale outreach efforts where appropriate

-- Stay updated with the latest SEO trends and tools

-- Monitor competitors and share insights to stay ahead of changes in your niche



REQUIREMENTS:



-- Proven experience in SEO with clear examples of websites you've helped rank

-- Deep understanding of Google ranking factors and algorithm updates

-- Proficiency in tools like Ahrefs, SEMRush, Google Search Console, Google Analytics, Screaming Frog, SurferSEO

-- Strong grasp of keyword research, content strategy, and content silos

-- Knowledge of internal linking best practices

-- Experience with WordPress, especially the block editor

-- Experience optimizing Google Business Profiles and managing citations

-- Working knowledge of technical SEO (crawl errors, page speed, schema, Core Web Vitals)

-- Strong written English (you don’t need to be a copywriter, but you can clearly edit and structure SEO content)

-- Analytical mindset and attention to detail

-- Self-starter who doesn’t wait for perfect instructions — you figure things out and test what works

-- Bonus: Familiarity with backlink outreach tools like Respona, 
, or BuzzStream

-- Bonus: Comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT to assist with writing SEO content



HOW TO APPLY (REQUIRED):

Please apply on our website: 



If you’re a self-motivated SEO professional who lives and breathes rankings, automation, and smart strategy — we want to hear from you.

title: Senior Accountant (Remote, Full-Time, 1099 Contractor)
description:
Senior Accountant (Remote, Full-Time, 1099 Contractor)



Compensation: $2,000 – $2,500/month (USD) DOE 

Schedule: Full-time, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM MST (U.S. Mountain Time) 

Location: Remote

Engagement Type: Independent Contractor (1099)



About the Role:

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented and proactive Senior Accountant to support multi-entity accounting operations for a growing U.S.-based business.



This role goes beyond basic bookkeeping—you will play a key role in maintaining accurate financials, supporting month-end close, and ensuring clean reporting across multiple entities. You will work closely with leadership and have a high level of ownership in the accounting function.



Key Responsibilities:

Manage full-cycle accounting across multiple entities

Perform bank and credit card reconciliations with high accuracy 

Assist in and help drive the month-end close (target: by the 15th)

Maintain accurate and up-to-date financials in Xero

Prepare and review financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet)

Track and manage intercompany transactions

Identify, investigate, and resolve discrepancies

Support payroll journal entries and expense allocations

Assist with internal and investor reporting

Continuously improve accounting processes and workflows



Skills + Requirements:

Xero Certified (Required)

3+ years of accounting experience (multi-entity preferred)

Strong written and verbal English communication skills (B2+) 

Accrual accounting

Financial statements

Account reconciliations

close attention to detail and strong organizational skills

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Available to work during US time zones 



Preferred (Nice to Have):

Experience working with U.S.-based companies

Familiarity with real estate or multi-entity environments

Experience with Gusto (payroll) and/or Avalara (1099/tax reporting)

Excel proficiency (pivot tables, lookups, formatting)



What Success Looks Like:

Clean, accurate books across all entities

Month-end close completed on time (by the 15th)

Minimal errors and strong attention to detail

Ability to identify and solve problems proactively

Clear, professional communication with the team



Contractor Terms:

This role is structured as an independent contractor (1099) position

Contractor is responsible for their own taxes, equipment, and work setup

Long-term, consistent engagement with an opportunity for increased responsibility over time



Why Join Us:

Work directly with leadership in a growing U.S.-based company

High level of ownership and responsibility

Opportunity to grow into a more senior accounting or finance role

title: Full-Time Video Editor VA – Short Form + YouTube
description:
About Us: 



We’re a fast-growing construction/home improvement brand based in the U.S. We create consistent video content for TikTok, Reels, Shorts, and YouTube. We need a reliable, skilled editor who can take ownership of editing and help us scale output without losing quality.



What You’ll Edit - 

* Short-form: TikTok / IG Reels / YouTube Shorts (15–60 seconds)

* YouTube: 5–12 minute videos (optional if you’re stronger in short-form)

* Talking-head + b-roll, jobsite footage, before/after, educational content



Responsibilities

* Edit short-form videos with strong pacing, hook, and retention

* Add captions (clean, readable), emojis only when it fits, and on-screen callouts

* Sound design: music, SFX, clean voice audio, remove background noise

* Basic color correction + consistent “look”

* Add b-roll, zooms, cuts, and motion elements to keep attention

* Create multiple versions of the same video (different hooks/first 2 seconds)

* Organize project files, naming conventions, and export settings

* Follow a brand style guide (we’ll provide examples)

* Hit deadlines and communicate clearly



Must-Have Skills

* Proven short-form editing experience (retention-focused)

* Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and hooks

* Clean captions + modern social style editing

* Can follow instructions AND bring creative ideas

* Reliable internet + strong communication

* Comfortable with feedback and quick revisions



Nice-to-Have

* Motion graphics (basic AE templates okay)

* Thumbnail design (YouTube)

* Experience with construction/real estate/home service content

* Knows how to repurpose long-form into short clips



Output Expectations (Example)

* Weekly: 10–20 short-form videos (depending on complexity)

* Turnaround: 24–48 hours per batch after receiving footage

* Revisions: usually 1–2 rounds max when done right



How We’ll Measure Success (KPIs)

* On-time delivery

* Quality + minimal revisions

* Retention-friendly edits (hook clarity, pacing, caption accuracy)

* Organization (files and versions are easy to find)

* Ability to match our style consistently

We’re expanding our remote sales team and looking for motivated, results-driven telemarketers to help us connect with homeowners, set appointments, and drive sales.



The Role: 

You’ll be responsible for calling warm and cold leads, introducing our services, and booking qualified appointments for our U.S. sales reps. We provide full training, scripts, and access to our dialer & CRM — all you need is a quiet workspace, strong internet, and the drive to perform.



Responsibilities

Make outbound calls to warm & cold leads in the U.S.

Follow a proven script to introduce our services.

Ask qualifying questions to ensure decision-makers are present.

Schedule confirmed appointments directly into our CRM.

Handle basic objections and keep a positive, professional tone.



Meet weekly call and appointment goals.

Requirements

BPO or telemarketing experience (2+ years required).



Excellent English communication skills (clear and professional).



Strong sales or appointment setting background.



Reliable computer, headset, and high-speed internet.



Comfortable working U.S. hours (Pacific Time Zone).



What We Offer

Hourly base pay $5–$8 USD + $5–$10 USD per qualified appointment.



Bonus tiers for 15–20+ weekly appointments.



Paid training & ongoing coaching.



Long-term position for top performers.



Work from home with a supportive, driven team.



Schedule:

Full-time: Monday–Friday, 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM PST

title: Conference & Events Coordinator
description:
Role Overview



The Conference & Events Coordinator provides operational and administrative support for Fortra Conferences and related events. This role is responsible for maintaining conference systems, supporting attendee and sponsor coordination, assisting with marketing workflows, and helping ensure event information is accurate and up to date across platforms.

 

This position works closely with the Marketing, Events, and Graphics teams and supports senior conference leadership with execution and coordination.



________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

Conference Systems & Data Management

• Maintain and update Airtable, Wrike, and Cvent for all conferences

• Add and update attendee, sponsor, and speaker records across systems

• Regularly audit attendee and sponsorship tabs to ensure accuracy and consistency

• Upload attendee lists to Wrike and shared drives; assist with internal and partner distribution

• Update Airtable following mail merges and registration updates

________________________________________

Sponsor & Attendee Coordination

• Register confirmed sponsors in Airtable, Wrike, and Cvent

• Assist with tracking sponsorships, registrations, and deliverables

• Support attendee communications and internal reporting needs

________________________________________

Marketing & Website Support

• Maintain and update conference websites with current information

• Coordinate with the graphics team on:

 o Conference graphics

 o Sponsor materials

 o Speaker bios and headshots

 o Swag and signage requests

• Submit graphic request forms for approved, straightforward items

________________________________________

Project & Administrative Support

• Create Wrike projects for confirmed conferences

• Update marketing agendas, Wrike tasks, Excel sheets, and conference agendas based on meeting notes and leadership direction

• Create calendar invites for new conferences, meetings, and events

________________________________________

Travel & Event Logistics Support

• Assist with coordinating travel and hotel logistics with partners’ assistants once conference attendance is confirmed

• Book travel for the marketing team when applicable

________________________________________

Ideal Candidate

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable working across multiple systems and tools

• Strong follow-through and ability to take direction

• Clear written and verbal communicator

• Interest in conferences, events, and marketing operations

________________________________________

Specific Requirements:



(a) Proficiency in the English language

(b) Must have reliable power and internet connection

(d) Work Pacific Time (Main Office is located in California)

(e) Must own a personal laptop (Windows or Mac) with a valid, fully licensed operating system. Minimum specifications: Windows 10 or macOS 12, Intel Core i5-1235U 1.30 GHz processor (or Apple M1/M2 equivalent), and at least 16GB of RAM.

(f) Must complete a speed test, meet system specification requirements, and meet laptop specification requirements.



Hours: 8:30 am—5:00 pm, PT, Monday through Friday

Salary: $800-$1000 a month plus $75 supplemental pay to use toward health insurance

________________________________________

Next Steps: 

Send us a link to a PDF of your resume and include a brief explanation of why you think you're the best fit for this position.



We look forward to seeing your application!

title: Paralegal
description:
We are a law firm in California with an active and engaged Philippine team seeking a driven and detail-oriented Litigation Paralegal to join our practice. 



We handle complex civil litigation matters, including real estate and bankruptcy disputes, contract claims, collections enforcement, and motion practice in California state and federal courts. Our work regularly involves drafting complaints, answers, oppositions, demurrers, discovery motions, etc.



We believe in technology. Understanding how to manage, adopt, train, and utilize new technologies is an essential requirement for everyone in our organization.

 

What’s the work?

• Draft pleadings, which include complaints, answers, demurrers, ex parte applications to shorten time, discovery motions, meet and confer letters, oppositions, etc. 

• Research in Westlaw  

• Respond to
s (clients and attorneys) within 30 minutes

• Gathering documents for subpoena response

• Correspond with clients, gathering info and schedule meetings with our litigation attorneys

• Attend recurring meetings such as litigation meetings, process meetings, paralegal training etc.

• Follow up on pending tasks

• Assist with legal work, including:

     ? Preparation and formatting of legal documents

     ? E-filing through Court Filing System / Attorney Services

     ? Coordinating process service

     ? Supporting attorneys with case management tasks

     ? Calendaring attorney’s deadlines, hearings, and meetings



This is not a passive administrative role. We are looking for someone who takes ownership of tasks from start to finish.



What skills and experience do we want and need?

• Prior experience in litigation required (PH litigation experience accepted)

• Experience in bankruptcy (not a requirement, but a plus)

• Skill to draft pleadings for attorneys which include complaints, answers, demurrers, ex parte applications to shorten time, discovery motions, meet and confer letters, oppositions, etc.  (not “templates” or forms, but actual content)

• Ability to manage workload and work well under pressure

• Strong organizational skills with the ability to track multiple deadlines

• Ability to take responsibility for assignments through completion

• Proficiency in Excel, Word, Outlook, Zoho; knowledge of legal billing system (ProLaw), is a plus

• Law degree or license is required

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• Reliable, high-speed internet connection

• Prior US remote experience required (i.e. night owl)



Qualities: 

• Reliable

• Accountable/honest

• Observant

• Punctual 

• Proactive (you anticipate issues before they become problems)



Working hours:



• Monday – Friday: 40 hours per week

• Must be willing to work at U.S./PST time:

• 7:00 am PST through 4:00 pm PST (11:00 pm through 7:00 am/next day Manila time) with one hour break.

• Change of schedule is subject to negotiation.



IT Requirements:

• Own a laptop with at least Windows 10, Processor I5 Core-1235U 1.30 GHz, 16GB

• Must complete a speed test, meet system specification requirements, and meet laptop specification requirements. Additional
 with more instructions will be sent as part of the application process.

title: VA Interior Design Assistant
description:
About Us

We are a dynamic and growing interior design firm looking for a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant (VA) to support our design team remotely. This role is perfect for someone with experience in interior design and a passion for supporting creative teams. You’ll work closely with designers to bring their vision to life through 3D modeling, project coordination, and procurement logistics. If you’re a detail-oriented professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment, we want to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities

- 3D Modeling & Rendering: Collaborate with designers to create high-quality 3D models and photorealistic renderings using design tools such as SketchUp, Revit, or similar software.

- Construction & Planning Documentation: Assist in preparing floor plans, elevations, sections, and other technical drawings for design development and construction.

- Materials & Product Research: Research materials, finishes, and furnishings that meet the project’s needs; compile detailed product specifications and comparisons.

- Vendor Communication & Procurement Support: Coordinate with vendors and suppliers to request samples, pricing, and lead times. Help prepare procurement schedules and manage order tracking.

- Project Coordination: Keep digital files organized, maintain project documentation, and ensure designers are updated on outstanding tasks and product delivery timelines.

- Administrative Support: Provide general administrative assistance, including scheduling meetings, updating client presentations, and entering data for project tracking.

Qualifications

- Proven experience in interior design support or a related Virtual Assistant role.

- Proficiency in design software: Revit (Priority), Enscape for SketchUp, Enscape for Rhino, or other rendering software. Familiarity with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, InDesign) is a plus.

- Strong research, organizational, and multitasking skills.

- Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.

- Self-motivated, dependable, and able to manage tasks independently in a remote setting.

- Must be available to work during PST business hours.

Why Join Us?

- Work with a creative and collaborative design team that values innovation and attention to detail.

- Flexible, remote work environment that promotes work-life balance.

- Opportunity to grow and gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced interior design setting.

Ready to be part of an innovative design team?

If you’re passionate about interior design, tech-savvy, and thrive in a remote role, we’d love to have you onboard. Apply today!

title: Finance Controller
description:
Role Summary

The Finance Controller is singularly responsible for all accounting, finance, and administrative needs of a small communications and marketing company with approximately 10 full-time employees, 10 +/- steady 1099 consultants, and additional staff/contractors that fluctuate to meet contract-by-contract client service needs. The Finance Controller owns day-to-day accounting and bookkeeping operations, produces GAAP-compliant financials, manages budgeting and cash flow forecasting, supports client/job costing, and ensures accurate reconciliation of paid media buys. The Finance Controller will administer payroll (via ADP or QuickBooks),  maintain strong internal controls and documentation, and prepare monthly GAAP compliant financial statements. 



Compensation: $1,500–$2,200/month for qualified candidate that owns this end-to-end

Work Hours: 10a-6p U.S. Eastern Time Zone; 40 hours/week



Key Responsibilities

Full-Cycle Accounting & Close

• Own and execute the full-cycle accounting function (A/P, A/R, general ledger, journal entries, accruals, and month-end close).

• Prepare and deliver monthly/quarterly/year-end financial statements in accordance with GAAP (Generally Accepted Accounting Principles).

• Maintain a clean chart of accounts and ensure accurate coding/classification of all transactions.

• Manage bank, credit card and balance sheet reconciliations; investigate and resolve discrepancies.

• Manage vendor billing and client invoicing.

QuickBooks Online Ownership

• Serve as QBO administrator, maintaining classes and projects, and optimizing QuickBooks Online (QBO) configuration, workflow integrity, and reporting.

• Ensure QBO data integrity and clean documentation supporting all accounting activity and audit readiness.

Taxes

• Maintain accurate tax records

• Support external tax preparer (CPA)

• Coordinate quarterly and annual filings, including support of K1 owners tax filing needs.

Budgeting & Cash Flow Forecasting

• Build and maintain annual budgets in QuickBooks Online (or supported tools tied into QBO) 

• Maintain updated project-level forecasts, including P&L by job/client contract

• Maintain and update cash flow forecasts based on revenue forecasts from Executive Management, as well as receivables, payables, payroll timing, and media/client commitments.  

• Provide leadership with visibility into cash needs and variances, runway, and actual spending vs. planned.

Time Tracking & Client/Job Costing

• Track employee hours (QBO timekeeper) and allocate/charge time to the appropriate billable client jobs/accounts.

• Support client billing, reporting, and internal profitability analysis by client/project, including labor, ODC, travel and paid media pass-through allocations.

Media Buy Reconciliation (U.S. Broadcast & Digital)

• Reconcile media buys acrossbroadcast, digital, social, and programmatic placements.  

• Match vendor invoices to insertion orders (IOs), schedules, impressions/units, and proof-of-performance.  

• Flag and resolve discrepancies and coordinate resolution with internal stakeholders and vendors.

• Ensure accurate pass-through billings and QBO bookings.

Payroll Administration

• Prepare and process payroll using ADP or QuickBooks.

• Maintain payroll records, ensure hours and allocations are correct, and support periodic payroll reporting.

• Maintain accurate deductions, job allocations, and payroll documentation.  

• Manage payroll changes related to onboarding/offboarding.

HR/ Benefits Administration (Accounting Perspective)

• Manage financial onboarding/offboarding, payroll setup, and benefit deductions.  

• Ensure timely renewals and payments for all benefit programs (medical/dental/vision insurance, 401K contributions and payments, etc).

• Maintain insurance renewals, payments, COIs, and compliance.

Administrative Support (as needed for a small company)

• Support routine finance/admin needs typical of a lean organization (vendor setup, documentation, basic process creation, etc.).

• Maintain organized records for audits, tax preparation, and compliance (in coordination with external providers, if applicable).

• Administer government and client invoice portals, registration portals, and required reporting.  

• Maintain multi-state business registrations and renewals (FL, CA, TX, GA, etc.), and pays annual or regularly scheduled fees on-time..  

• Manage Duns & Bradstreet profile to maintain excellent standing. 

Required Qualifications

• 6+ years of full-cycle accounting experience; experience as sole or lead accountant (Finance Director, Controller, Accounting Manager, etc).  

• Significant, hands-on experience serving as the primary controller or accountant for a small business (owning end-to-end accounting).

• Advanced proficiency with QuickBooks Online (required).

• Demonstrated ability to prepare GAAP-compliant financial statements.

• Strong experience building budgets and cash flow forecasts, ideally within or alongside QBO.

• Experience with timekeeping and allocating labor to billable client accounts (job costing/project accounting).

• Experience reconciling complex vendor billing against orders—ideally including media buy reconciliation.

• Payroll processing experience (via ADP and/or QuickBooks Payroll).

• Experience with government portals, client invoicing systems, and multi-state compliance.  

• High attention to detail, strong organization, and ability to work independently with minimal oversight.

Preferred Qualifications

• Experience in advertising/media, agencies, or environments with media buying, proper allocation of labor hours per client billable work and vendor reconciliations.

• Experience improving/standardizing processes and internal controls in a small company setting.

Key Competencies

• Ownership mentality and ability to operate independently

• Strong judgment and discretion with confidential information

• Clear communication with non-finance stakeholders

• Deadline management (close, payroll, vendor cycles)

• Analytical problem-solving and reconciliation skills



Application Package: Please include in your message:

• If you have experience running payroll from QBO or include the name of other payroll platforms with which you’ve worked; 

• The names of companies and positions where you worked autonomously to own accounting, bookkeeping responsibilities end-to-end; and,

• The specific workstreams that you ran 100% on your own within the finance department.

title: Architect & Estimating VA for OWSI Flooring & Design + Gemstone Development
description:
We’re on the lookout for an Architect & Estimating Virtual Assistant who’s ready to bring talent, energy, and creativity to our growing team!



This is a joint position with OWSI Flooring & Design and Gemstone Development, two leading Utah-based companies that design and build some of the most beautiful custom homes in the state. From ground-up builds to detailed remodels, we’re looking for someone who can help us turn ideas into full, professional house plans and accurate estimates that our builders can count on.



If you’re passionate about architecture, rendering, and design – and you love collaborating with a driven, positive team – this is your chance to be part of something amazing.



Your Key Responsibilities:



~ Create full residential floor plans, elevations, and layouts using AutoCAD and other professional programs.

~ Develop high-quality, realistic 3D renders that bring spaces to life.

~ Use MeasureSquare (provided by us) to generate takeoffs and integrate data into our estimating system.

~ Confidently communicate with suppliers and subcontractors to gather bids, confirm details, and schedule work.

~ Work directly with the owner and design team on cabinetry, bathroom, and interior layouts.

~ Prepare detailed spec sheets, product lists, and design documentation for projects.

~ Support both companies with a wide range of design, estimating, and coordination tasks as needed for our overall success.



Skills & Qualifications:



~ Strong background in architectural drafting, residential design, and plan creation.

~ Proficiency in AutoCAD, SketchUp, Revit, Lumion, V-Ray, Enscape, or similar rendering software.

~ Must have and supply your own design and rendering programs.

~ Experience using MeasureSquare for takeoffs and estimating (we provide the license).

~ Familiar with USA and Utah building code standards and residential plan requirements.

~ Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

~ Professional confidence when communicating with suppliers, builders, and subcontractors.

~ High attention to detail, accuracy, and time management.

~ Must have a computer capable of rendering (GPU-ready setup preferred).

~ Familiar with Dropbox, Google Drive, and task management tools like ClickUp or Notion.

~ Must be solution-oriented — we value people who take initiative and figure things out.



Bonus Skills (Preferred but Not Required):



~ Background in interior design or finish selection.

~ Experience with cabinet layouts, millwork drawings, or custom room detailing.

~ Previous estimating experience for finish materials (tile, flooring, lighting, cabinetry, etc.).

~ Experience working with US-based builders or construction companies.



Schedule and Work Requirements:



~ Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Mountain Standard Time (Utah Time)

~ Must work live on screen with the owner and team during those hours.

~ Must be available for occasional urgent needs outside of schedule.

~ High productivity and strong results will lead to more hours, growth, and long-term opportunities.

~ Use of Hubstaff for Time Tracking is a must



About OWSI & Gemstone Development:



OWSI Flooring & Design and Gemstone Development are Utah-based companies that work together to create high-end custom homes and luxury remodels. Through OWSI, we partner with builders to supply design-driven products and finishes. Through Gemstone, we design and build one-of-a-kind custom homes across Utah.



We value hard work, honesty, creativity, and a team spirit. Our ideal teammate is confident, resourceful, and passionate about doing excellent work — someone who wants to grow with us for years to come.



How to Apply:

Please include the following in your application:



1) Subject line: “Architect & Estimating VA – Building Utah’s Best Homes!”

2) A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) telling us about your background, your experience with architectural design, rendering, and estimating, and why you’d be a great fit for our team.

3) Links to your portfolio or work samples (AutoCAD plans, renders, or similar).

4) A short written summary describing the design and rendering programs you use, along with your computer specifications.

5) Confirmation that you are available M–F, 8AM–5PM Mountain Standard Time.

title: OBM - Online Insurance Education School
description:

You will be the engine behind our content pipeline, webinar execution, lead follow-up, and back-end organization — so our team can stay focused on serving clients and closing business.

• Post to TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts

• Repurpose 1 video into 3–5 clips



2. Webinar Setup & Tech

• Upload slides into Zoom / Go High Level (GHL)

• Set up reminder
s and texts

• Build the replay page

• Link checkout buttons and test all links



3. Lead Management

4. Project Organization

5. Course & System Uploads

title: Client Onboarding Specialist
description:
KINDLY READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION & THE APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY.



The Onboarding Specialist is responsible for ensuring a smooth transition when a new association begins management services. Their tasks are front-loaded and focused on gathering, organizing, and setting up essential information for the Community Management Team for effective oversight. Onboarding responsibilities end once the setup tasks are completed, and the day-to-day management is fully transferred to the Property Manager (CAM) and Assistant Property Manager (ACAM).



Duties & Responsibilities:

- Data Collection: Gather association documents from the outgoing manager or board for onboarding.

- Vendor Coordination: Distribute vendor packets with billing updates, VIVE registration, and invoice procedures.

- Board Information: Compile board member contact details and provide regular transition updates.

- Community Welcome: Send welcome communications covering payments, contacts, and emergency procedures.

- Setup & Configuration: Initiate VIVE setup and notify the after-hours team. Set up utilities, insurance, and compliance registrations. Configure assessments, fees, and Condo Certs. Upload key documents to the system.

- File Management: Store all onboarding files in SharePoint under the appropriate folder.

- Billing Oversight (First 2 Months): Ensure accurate receipt and processing of vendor bills.

- Post-Transition: Coordinate reserve transfers and close-out tasks. Enter homeowner balances, review final financials, and arrange delivery of physical assets. Special Projects: Support additional projects as assigned.



Benefits: HMO and PTOs after 90 days.



Working conditions:

- Candidate must be able to work from 9 am to 5 pm EST.

- Comfortable working with Hubstaff.



If you have the experience, and if this opportunity interests you, here is how to apply:



1. Please check out website: 

2. Send an
 attachment of your updated resume in PDF format (NO LINKS, please).

3. Send a link to of your video recording introducing yourself, an overview of your experience, and why are you looking for new opportunities.

3. Please indicate that you're comfortable with $6 USD per hour.

4. Kindly send your application to 
 the subject line, kindly indicate the position Client Onboarding Specialist - your name.



*Applicants who will not follow instructions will be automatically rejected without notice.

* Shortlisted applicants will be contacted by
 for interview scheduling.



Looking forward to working with you!

title: Founding AI Video Alchemist (Full-Time / Full-Out Role)
description:
Are you a video editor who feels like "standard editing" is dead? We aren't looking for someone to just cut clips together. We are looking for a Founding Member who is obsessed with the intersection of human creativity and Generative AI. We build autonomous systems and high-growth brands, and we need a partner who can turn raw ideas into high-retention, AI-enhanced video content that dominates social platforms.



What "Full Out" Means Here

This is not a "tasks assigned" job. This is a Founding Role.



You don't wait for us to tell you what's new—you tell us.



You don't just "edit"—you architect the visual experience.



You play to win, you grow personally and professionally, and you treat every piece of content like it’s your own brand.



The Technical Arsenal (Must-Haves)

AI Look-a-Likes & Cloning: You must be a pro at generating high-fidelity AI look-a-like videos using HeyGen, Higgsfield, or other emerging generative platforms.



Strategic B-Roll Generation: You know how to use AI (Midjourney, Runway, Pika, etc.) to generate custom B-roll and place it strategically to maximize viewer retention on Shorts and Reels.



Tool Agnostic: Whether you use Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut, we don't care—as long as the output is world-class.



Continuous Evolution: You are a "student of the game." You spend your free time in 
 servers and YouTube rabbit holes studying the latest AI video tech before it even goes viral.



Impeccable Taste: You have an "eye" for what works. You know when a transition is too much and when a caption style is exactly right for the niche.



Key Responsibilities

End-to-End Content Creation: Transform raw footage or concepts into high-impact short-form and long-form video content.



AI Innovation: Constant experimentation with new tools to improve our efficiency and visual "wow" factor.



Strategic Hook/Caption Design: Crafting captions and visual hooks that stop the scroll.



Full-Time Commitment: You are dedicated to our vision, working in a "results-only" environment where your impact is directly measured.



Why Join Us?

Founder-Level Mentorship: You aren't an employee; you're a teammate. You'll have access to high-level executive coaching and performance mentoring (valued at thousands of dollars) to help you break through your own career ceilings.



Incentivized Growth: We start at a fair base salary, but your raises are tied to the growth and success of the company. As we win, you win.



Cutting-Edge Stack: We don't use old-school systems. We leverage Claude Code, custom AI agents, and the latest automation.



How to Apply (The Test)

To be considered, you MUST submit:



Your Portfolio: Show us your best work.



AI Specific Samples: Send at least one example of a video where you utilized HeyGen, Higgsfield, or AI-generated B-roll.



The "Nerd" Proof: List the top 3 AI video tools you are currently testing or excited about and why.



If you’re looking for a comfortable, repetitive desk job, please do not apply. If you’re ready to play full out and build the future of content, we want to talk to you.

title: Amazon PPC Internship – Competitive Training Program
description:
Company: Seller Fuel (dba Toy Launch)

 Location: Remote

 Schedule: Full-Time Internship — Must be willing to work U.S. hours (Arizona Time)

 Experience Required: ZERO. We train you.



About the Role



Seller Fuel (dba Toy Launch) is looking for driven and highly competitive Amazon PPC Interns to join our fast-growing eCommerce team.



This is NOT a passive internship.



You will learn real Amazon PPC, work with real data, support client reporting, and gain hands-on experience inside an agency that manages 30+ toy & game brands on Amazon.



If you love numbers, spreadsheets, fast learning, and competition, this opportunity can fast-track your career into one of the highest-demand skills in eCommerce.



***The Toy Launch PPC Internship – Squid Game Edition***

All selected candidates must first complete our 10-day Elite PPC Training Program.

This is an intense training and evaluation program designed to identify the next generation of Amazon PPC specialists.



During these 2 weeks you will:

• Learn Amazon PPC from the ground up

 • Train using tools like Helium 10, DataDive, Ad Badger, and ClickUp

 • Complete a full Amazon PPC account audit

 • Participate in daily quizzes, challenges, and competitions

 • Work inside a fast-paced agency-style environment



This program simulates the real pressure of working inside a high-performing digital marketing agency.



***Daily Eliminations***

This program is highly competitive.

Participants are evaluated every single day.



Daily eliminations will occur based on:

• Quiz scores

 • Assignment quality

 • Participation and engagement

 • Work ethic

 • Attention to detail

 • Communication and professionalism

 • Ability to follow instructions



Only the top performers advance.



At the end of the program:

Only 2–4 interns will receive paid internship positions at Toy Launch.

Everyone else will be eliminated during the program.



This environment is designed for people who:

• Learn very fast

 • Perform well under pressure

 • Thrive in competitive environments

 • Want to become elite Amazon PPC specialists



If you are looking for a relaxed internship, this program is not for you.



Program Schedule (Arizona Time)

Participants must commit to the full training schedule:

7:00 AM – 3:00 PM (Arizona Time)



Daily structure includes:

• Daily morning huddle and instructions

 • PPC training and exercises

 • Hands-on audit work

 • Team challenges and quizzes

 • End-of-day performance reporting

Consistent participation is required.



Attendance & Performance Rules



This program operates with strict professional expectations.



Participants will receive performance strikes for:

• Late attendance to daily meetings

 • Late start times

 • Missing required reports

 • Failure to follow instructions



Multiple strikes may result in immediate elimination from the program.



These rules ensure fairness and simulate the expectations of a real agency environment.



Final Evaluation



Toward the end of the program:

Participants must complete a full Amazon PPC audit and present their findings.



Evaluation will focus on:

• Accuracy of analysis

 • Depth of insights

 • Practical recommendations

 • Presentation quality

 • Ability to answer strategic questions



Only the top candidates will receive job offers.



What You’ll Learn

Participants will gain hands-on experience with:

• Amazon PPC campaign structure

 • Keyword research and optimization

 • Search term report analysis

 • Budget management and bid optimization

 • PPC account audits

 • Competitor and market research

 • Preparing data for client presentations

 • Agency workflow tools like ClickUp



This is real agency training, not theoretical coursework.



What We’re Looking For



No Amazon PPC experience required.



However, we expect:

• Strong English communication skills

 • Willingness to work U.S. hours (graveyard shift)

 • Comfort working with spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel)

 • Strong critical thinking and analytical ability

 • High attention to detail

 • Fast learning ability

 • Strong work ethic and discipline

 • Professional communication



Bonus if you have experience with:

• Data analysis

 • Virtual assistant work

 • Reporting or research

 • Digital marketing



Perks & Work Setup

• 100% remote

 • Elite Amazon PPC training

 • Work with experienced PPC managers

 • Opportunity to become a full Amazon PPC Specialist

 • Exposure to real agency client accounts



Our culture is built on:

Fun. Upbeat. Efficient. Limitless.



About Seller Fuel & Toy Launch

Seller Fuel is an eCommerce growth company that helps toy & game brands scale on Amazon and beyond.



Our in-house brand LakiKid supports children with Autism, ADHD, and Sensory Processing Disorder.



Our products appear in 300+ venues across the U.S., including NBA arenas, zoos, and schools through partnerships like KultureCity.



Learn more:







How to Apply

Please follow these instructions carefully.

Only applicants who complete ALL steps will receive the formal application form.



Step 1 — Submit exactly 7 Apply Points

Step 2 — In your FIRST reply include:

1. Your spreadsheet skill level (beginner / intermediate / advanced)

2. Your comfort level explaining data (1–10 scale + why)

3. A scenario where you solved a problem using logic or analysis

4. Any VA / PPC courses you’ve taken (course + platform + summary)

5. Expected monthly salary (USD)

6. One fun fact about yourself

7. Why you would thrive in a toy & game–focused agency



Step 3 — Include a link to your CV / resume



Only candidates who follow the instructions will receive the next step: the official application + assessment link.

If instructions are not followed, we will not reply.



Welcome to the Toy Launch PPC Internship Program.

Where learning is fast, pressure is real, and only the best rise to the top.

title: Ads Buyer
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Media Buyer to own our paid advertising performance across platforms, with a primary focus on Meta 
 & Instagram Ads). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelance or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is data-driven, detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with creatives to improve ad performance through clear insights and testing.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Launch, manage, and optimize ad campaigns primarily on Meta Ads. Support campaigns on Google, TikTok, or other platforms where relevant.

- Plan and execute structured tests (angles, creatives, offers, landing page) to improve cost per acquisition and ROAS.

- Manage budgets, audiences, and campaign structures based on performance

- Analyze ad performance to identify winning and underperforming ads

- Communicate clear performance insights to the creative team

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve creatives based on data

- Analyze Shopify sales data to identify scaling opportunities, conversion bottlenecks and product-level performance

- Monitor competitors’ ads, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC industry trends and platform updates to ensure best practices.

- Providing administrative support, as and when needed to the manager.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong comfort working with numbers and data

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain performance clearly to non-technical teammates

- Highly organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently

- Willing to learn quickly and adapt as the business grows



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work

- Training, upskilling, and career growth opportunities

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "Ads Buyer – (Your Name)”. Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Tell us about your most recent job: your job overview, and how long did you work there? 

2) Why did you leave the job? 

3) What did you try (on your own) that worked or didn't work? What did you learn from it and what would you do differently now? 

4) Please submit as much portfolio as possible. If you don’t have relevant DTC experience, submit your best work portfolio. Strong portfolios outside this role may be considered for other roles.

5) Pick one project from the attached portfolio in question (4) that you are most proud of and answer the questions below. You may pick more than one project.

- What the project was

- Your contribution

- Why you approached it this way

- Results (provide metrics if possible)



Keywords

 ads specialist,

 advertising, meta ads, meta ads specialist, meta ads manager, meta ads buyer, fb ads manager, media buyer,

title: Data Automation Specialist
description:
Role: Data Automation Specialist 

Company: Chasm Opportunities LLC 

Location: Remote 

Hours: Part-time, 10 hours per week for 12 weeks 

Compensation: 4USD per hour. An extended contract may be available depending on your performance and company business revenue.  If extended, then a new higher USD rate per hour will be negotiated.

About Us & The Role Chasm Opportunities (CO) is a new technology-transition consulting firm operating as a highly disciplined, lean team. We help small businesses secure funding from government (DoD/DoE) and commercial markets. We are just now starting to develop our Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and build out our operational data engine for our Proposal Identification and Preparation Service.

Because this workflow process is not overly complicated, this is an excellent project for a junior assistant with minimal experience who wants to help a growing firm build its foundational automations and trackers. You will be responsible for creating automated, low-code data pipelines to streamline our service blueprint. It is highly critical that all solutions are built using low-code/no-code tools so that the systems can be easily maintained by our internal team without dedicated developer support.

Key Responsibilities

• Automated Data Extraction: Build structured RSS feeds and low-code workflows to systematically scan websites (e.g., DoD/DoE BAAs, SBIR/STTR, 
, 
) and automatically extract key funding opportunity metadata (title, agency, due dates, technical scope, and eligibility).

• Data Management: Feed the extracted metadata seamlessly into a tracking database. Develop matching algorithm between Funding Opportunity data and our Client Profile Repository.

• Process Automation: Automate generation of a client-facing Opportunity Summary (OS) using the extracted metadata. Develop general business automations across the service blueprint, such as triggering notifications or task assignments when an opportunity status changes to "Pursue" or "Submitted."

• System Documentation: Design all automations with simplicity in mind and create clear, step-by-step documentation so internal tea
mbers can understand and maintain the workflows.

Minimum Requirements

• Education: Bachelor’s degree, preferably in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.

• Language: English level C1 or C2 to ensure clear written updates, communication, and process documentation.

• Low-Code/No-Code Expertise: Proven ability to build data extraction and workflow automations using platforms like Zapier, 
, or similar tools. You must design with simplicity and maintainability in mind.

• CRM Proficiency: Experience structuring workflows in 
 is helpful but not strictly required, provided you have experience with automations involving CRMs.

• Work Style: High attention to detail, a methodical approach to following instructions, and the ability to operate independently in an async, remote environment.

How to Apply:

1. Describe an example of a low-code/no-code automation or data extraction pipeline you have built. What tools did you use, and where did the data flow? Add “Yes, I follow detailed workflows closely” to the end of your application.

2. Your experience managing RSS feeds or web-scraping for data capture.

3. Confirmation of your availability to handle 6–10 hours per week.  If you have a full-time job and are applying, be specific about hours available and note whether your current employer requires your permission to accept another position.

title: Senior Amazon Catalog Manager (SEO, Bundles & Revenue Optimization)
description:
# Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term Position



We are a growing U.S.-based premium brand building a **high-performance Amazon team** focused on scaling revenue and operational excellence.



We are seeking an experienced **Amazon Catalog Manager** to take full ownership of our catalog, listings, and revenue optimization strategy.



This is **not an entry-level role**. We are looking for someone who deeply understands Amazon — including catalog structure, indexing, variation strategy, flat files, **bundling, promotions**, and Seller Central troubleshooting.



---



## Your Role



You will be responsible for the overall health, optimization, and performance of our Amazon catalog.



Your work will directly impact organic rankings, conversion rates, and **revenue growth through SEO, bundling, and promotional strategies**.



You will fully own the catalog.



---



## What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days)



* Improved indexing and keyword rankings across key listings

* Increased conversion rates through listing and image optimization

* Reduction in suppressed listings and catalog errors

* Successful implementation of bundles and promotional strategies

* Measurable growth in revenue and average order value (AOV)



---



## Core Responsibilities



### Catalog Management



* Create and optimize listings (Titles, Bullet Points, Descriptions, Backend Search Terms)

* Build and manage parent-child variations correctly

* Perform bulk updates using flat files (required skill)

* Fix suppressed listings and catalog errors

* Resolve stranded inventory issues

* Maintain listing compliance with Amazon policies

* Manage and update A+ Content



---



### Amazon SEO & Optimization



* Conduct advanced keyword research (Helium 10, DataDive, or similar)

* Improve indexing and organic rankings

* Monitor keyword performance and adjust strategy

* Increase conversion rates through listing improvements

* Analyze competitors and identify ranking opportunities



---



### Bundles, Promotions & Revenue Optimization



* Create and manage product bundles and virtual bundles

* Develop and execute promotional strategies (coupons, deals, discounts)

* Increase average order value (AOV) through bundling strategies

* Identify revenue growth opportunities through offer structuring

* Analyze performance of promotions and optimize based on data

* Coordinate bundle positioning within catalog and listings



---



### Image Strategy & Coordination (No Design Required)



* Conduct image audits to improve click-through rate and conversion rate

* Analyze competitor images and identify improvement opportunities

* Create detailed image briefs for designers

* Coordinate with designers and photographers

* Ensure all images comply with Amazon policies

* Upload and manage image order within listings

* Continuously improve images based on performance data



---



### Amazon Creator & Influencer Content



* Manage Amazon Creator Connections and influencer collaborations

* Identify and work with relevant creators to drive external traffic and conversions

* Oversee creator-generated content usage within listings and storefront

* Track performance of influencer campaigns and optimize strategy



---



### Seller Central Management



* Open and manage Seller Support cases

* Handle Brand Registry-related issues

* Monitor listing health dashboards

* Ensure correct category placement and attributes



---



## Required Experience



* 3+ years managing Amazon Seller Central

* Strong flat file experience (mandatory)

* Deep understanding of Amazon SEO and indexing

* Experience fixing suppressed listings

* Strong variation strategy experience

* **Proven experience with bundles and/or virtual bundles**

* **Proven experience running promotions (coupons, deals, discounts)**

* Strong written English skills

* **Strong ownership mindset with the ability to operate independently and make decisions**

* Willing and able to consistently work with **4–6 hours overlap with U.S. business hours**



---



## Preferred (Bonus) Experience



* Experience working with branded or premium products

* Experience with Brand Registry

* Experience significantly improving conversion rates

* Experience with Amazon Creator Connections or influencer marketing

* Understanding of external traffic strategies (Amazon Attribution, etc.)

* Strong data-driven mindset



---



## Compensation



* Competitive monthly salary based on experience and proven results

* Performance-based bonuses

* Long-term opportunity

* Growth potential into senior operations role



---



## Work Details



* Full-time

* Remote

* Must be willing to work **U.S. business hours (EST/PST)**

* Must have **at least 4–6 hours of daily overlap with U.S. working hours**

* Long-term commitment required (no short-term freelancers)



---



## This Role Is NOT For You If:



* You rely on step-by-step instructions instead of taking ownership

* You do not have hands-on flat file experience

* You have only managed small or inactive Amazon accounts

* You are looking for short-term or freelance work

* You are not available to work at least 4–6 hours overlapping with U.S. business hours



---



## How to Apply (Important)



**Subject Line Requirement (Mandatory)**

Include the word **“VELARION”** in the subject line of your application.

Applications without this exact word will not be reviewed.



---



Please send:



1. A short summary of your Amazon experience

2. 2–3 examples of listings you have optimized

3. A brief explanation of how you improve indexing

4. Your expected monthly salary

5. A link to your CV/resume with work history

6. Your current timezone and **daily hours of overlap with U.S. business hours**



---



### Required Experience Checklist (Mandatory)



Please confirm your experience with each of the following by replying with **YES or NO**:



* Amazon Seller Central (3+ years)

* Flat file uploads and bulk catalog management

* Parent-child variation setup and troubleshooting

* Fixing suppressed listings and listing errors

* Amazon SEO and keyword indexing

* Keyword research tools (Helium 10, DataDive, etc.)

* Improving conversion rates through listing optimization

* A+ Content management

* Competitor analysis for ranking improvements

* Bundles / Virtual Bundles management

* Promotions (coupons, deals, discounts)

* Amazon Creator Connections / influencer collaboration



---



### Optional but Strongly Preferred (Confirm YES/NO)

---

---



If you take ownership, think strategically, and know how to drive real results on Amazon — we want to hear from you.

title: Technical Support Specialist
description:

 automates data intake workflows for financial services companies in the United States. We’re looking for a JavaScript-focused developer to build, customize, and implement complex workflows on the Feathery platform for enterprise customers.

title: Transportation Tracker
description:
AJG Transport is expanding its route operations division and seeking a reliable, detail-oriented professional to help support and streamline our daily duties. We are looking for a Transportation Tracker to support real time fleet movement, manage load data accuracy, and ensure smooth coordination between drivers, customers, and internal teams. This role is ideal for someone highly organized, proactive, and comfortable operating in a fast paced logistics environment where precision matters



Role Overview

As an Transportation Tracker, you will serve as a real time control point within route operations. Your responsibility is to ensure loads are properly assigned, tracked, updated, and documented while maintaining consistent communication across drivers, brokers, and customers. You will operate within structured SOPs while making fast, sound operational decisions when challenges arise.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Assign and dispatch loads based on driver availability, Hours of Service, and customer requirements

• Monitor live fleet movement using GPS and TMS

• Track and update ETAs, check calls, timestamps, and delivery milestones in real time

• Enter, audit, and maintain accurate load data in Google Sheets and TMS

• Communicate continuously with drivers, brokers, and customers regarding status updates

• Identify delays, route conflicts, detention risks, or service issues and take proactive action

• Escalate operational risks to leadership when necessary

• Generate shift based operational reports summarizing load activity and exceptions

• Follow dispatch, communication, and escalation SOPs consistently

• Maintain clean shift handoffs and organized documentation



What Success Looks Like

• TMS, Google Sheets, and tracking platforms reflect complete and error free data at all times

• Scheduled updates are sent on time

• Critical loads are monitored closely and handled with urgency from start to finish

• Communication is clear, concise, and actionable, both in written updates and verbal escalations

• Operational risks and issues are flagged early with solutions, not just problems

• Shift handoffs are smooth, complete, and well documented

• You become someone the team can depend on during high pressure situations



Who We’re Looking For

• Has experience in logistics, freight brokerage, dispatch, or transportation tracking

• Understanding of fleet coordination, load planning, and HOS awareness

• Familiar with US geography and US logistics trucking operations (a plus)

• Ability to monitor multiple loads and drivers simultaneously

• Understands urgency and prioritization in a live dispatch environment

• Communicates clearly and professionally via zoom, chat, and

• Minimum 45 WPM typing speed

• Can monitor multiple loads at once without losing accuracy

• Pays strong attention to detail and uses sound judgment when issues arise

• Comfortable operating in high volume communication environments

• Follows instructions consistently and values clean execution

• Works well with a team and is open to feedback and coaching. Collaborates without resistance or ego



Why Join AJG Transport?

• Permanent remote opportunity

• Structured systems and clear expectations

• Hands on leadership and direct feedback

• Defined KPIs and measurable growth

• Opportunity to grow within a scaling freight brokerage

• Performance recognition and advancement potential



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full Time Remote Role| Direct Hire to US Company

• Current Shift Need: 7 AM - 5 PM CDT & 3 PM - 1 AM CDT

• Other shifts (only if assigned): 11 PM - 9 AM CDT

• Zoom presence (with camera open and unmuted audio) required

• Time tracking software used for accountability and performance support

• Shifts may adjust based on operational demand



If you thrive in fast moving transportation operations, understand the importance of real time coordination, and can execute with precision under pressure, we want to hear from you.

description:
About Us

mbers, improve processes, and solve problems without needing constant direction.

mbers, clients, and contractors when required

mbers and following up tasks

title: High Quality Video Editor - Reels/Shorts
description:
PLEASE READ ENTIRE DESCRIPTION THOROUGHLY. A BIG PART OF THIS JOB IS BEING ABLE TO FOLLOW DIRECTIONS.



Video Editor — UGC & Social Content (Remote, Philippines-Based)

We're a Female Condom company looking for a talented video editor based in the Philippines to join our team on a freelance basis. If you have a great creative eye, love social media content, and know how to make videos feel alive — keep reading.



What you'll be doing

You'll be taking raw UGC footage and transforming it into scroll-stopping social content for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. This means adding motion graphics, fun animations, captions, and sound design that elevate the video without losing that authentic, real-person feel. You'll work primarily on short-form content (Reels, TikToks) and will play a big role in shaping how our brand shows up visually on social.



What we're looking for

You have a genuine feel for what makes content perform on social — you watch Reels and TikToks and instinctively know why something works. You can take a raw, unpolished clip and make it gripping without making it feel produced or salesy (think about the videos that content creators in New York City are making). You understand the difference between content that feels like an ad and content that actually stops people from scrolling — and you always aim for the latter. You're comfortable with motion graphics and animation and know how to use them to add energy and personality rather than noise. You're proactive, communicative, and take creative ownership of your work.



Must-haves

You're proficient in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or CapCut (or a combination). You have experience editing short-form social content specifically — a portfolio that shows this is essential. You have a strong sense of pacing, music, and sound design. You're reliable, meet deadlines, and communicate clearly in English. Experience with After Effects or motion graphics tools.



Strong grasp of visual hierarchy — knowing how to use scale, contrast, and placement to guide the viewer's eye and emphasize the right 
nts. Uses design intentionally to reinforce key messages, not just decorate the frame

Understands how to create captions and text overlays that add context or emotion rather than just transcribing what's being said. Keeps a pulse on design trends to ensure content feels current and platform-native, not dated. Knows how to balance brand consistency with visual freshness — so everything looks cohesive without feeling repetitive. Can make deliberate choices around font, color, and motion that elevate the content and reflect a premium, modern aesthetic



Nice to haves

A background in or passion for health, wellness, or lifestyle content. Experience working with UGC creators or social-first brands.



How to apply

Please send an edited version of this video as an example of your capabilities: 
/drive/u/0/folders/1OOPnminKMcrFGOiSaPJ05x17BMfy7uzd

Please provide a rundown of all the edits you made and why you made them. I am looking for someone with strong strategic skills.



WHAT I'LL BE LOOKING FOR:

-Color correction

-Sound correction

-Strong understanding of how to use captions to make the content better. Do you emphasize important words?

-What fonts are you using? Are they interesting and current? (A lot of editors on here use fonts that look outdated)

-Are you able to look at the examples I've given and create content that feels really similar to the style.

-How are you using sounds to make the content more fun and engaging? Sometimes the content needs music, other times music will make it feel too much like an infomercial. Are you able to distinguish when it's appropriate to use music and when you should be letting the content stand alone?



See examples of videos here: 
/view/cfcontentlibary/home

title: Customer Service Virtual Assistant — Multi-Brand E-Commerce (Skincare & Personal Care)
description:
We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Customer Service Virtual Assistant to support our growing portfolio of e-commerce skincare and personal care brands. This is a full-time role (40 hours/week) handling customer inquiries, order management, and subscription support across multiple Shopify stores.



You'll be the first point of contact for customers across three active brands (with a fourth launching soon), using pre-written templates and SOPs to resolve tickets quickly and accurately. All brands operate on the same tech stack: Gorgias for helpdesk, Shopify for orders, Skio for subscriptions, and we coordinate with our fulfillment warehouse through Slack.



This is an SOP-driven role. You will be given clear instructions, templates, and processes for every task. We're looking for someone who follows directions precisely and asks questions before acting.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Respond to customer
s and messages via Gorgias (or similar technology) across all brands using pre-written templates

- Handle order inquiries: tracking updates, missing items, order modifications, cancellations

- Process change-of-address requests before orders ship

- Process returns and exchanges following step-by-step SOPs

- Coordinate with our fulfillment warehouse via Slack for reships and address issues

- Monitor orders for address verification flags and resolve them via SMS outreach

- Help customers with subscription questions and direct them to the self-service portal

- Investigate subscription disputes by reviewing audit logs and order history before responding

- Context-switch between brands while keeping tone, policies, and products straight

- Escalate anything outside your SOPs to the team lead before taking action



GROWTH OPPORTUNITY:

This role has a clear path to a team lead / CS manager position. As we scale, we'll be hiring additional VAs, and the right person in this role will help train new tea
mbers, manage the CS team, and report directly to the founder. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Strong written English — clear, friendly, and professional

- Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

- Available to work during US business hours (overlap with 9 AM – 8 PM Pacific Time required)

- Experience with customer service or virtual assistant work (preferred but not required)

- Experience handling multiple clients, accounts, or brands is a strong plus

- Familiarity with Shopify, Gorgias, Skio, Slack, or similar tools is a plus

- Detail-oriented — you follow instructions carefully and don't skip steps

- Comfortable asking questions rather than guessing



COMPENSATION & DETAILS:

- $3.50/hour USD, 40 hours/week; and up depending on experience and fit

- Paid weekly via PayPal (every Monday for the previous week)

- 13th month bonus paid in December

- Long-term position with clear path to team lead / CS manager role

- Start date: As soon as possible



HOW TO APPLY:

Please include a brief message about your experience with customer service and why you'd be a great fit. Bonus points if you've managed CS for multiple brands or clients, or if you've used Gorgias, Shopify, Skio, or Slack.



We'll review applications and reach out to schedule a short introductory call via Google Meet.

title: GRAPHIC DESIGNER — LONG-TERM PARTNERSHIP (D2C E-commerce))
description:
Let me be upfront with you, because that's how we operate.



We're a D2C e-commerce brand in the women's health space. We run paid ads on Meta. We sell a product that genuinely helps people, and every visual we produce reflects that. 



Transparency and honesty aren't buzzwords here, they're the reason our customers trust us, and the reason we're still growing.



We've worked with designers before. Some were talented. Most were treated like vendors, asset in, asset out, goodbye.

That's not what we're building.



We're in this for the long game. We want you to be too.



- THE ROLE



Position: Direct Response Graphic Designer for Meta Ads

Commitment: Full-time, long-term (this is not a freelance gig)

Hours: 40h/week

Location: 100% remote

Market: English-speaking (US primary)

Compensation: $800–$1,200/month base + performance bonuses



- WHAT LONG-TERM ACTUALLY MEANS HERE



Year-over-year salary increases of 10–20% for strong performers.

Performance bonuses tied directly to ad performance and ROAS.

Creative ownership: you'll understand the strategy, the avatar, the psychology behind every visual.

A real team: you'll work closely with the founder and marketing lead, not disappear into a ticket queue.



- WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Non-negotiable:



3+ years as a graphic designer in DTC e-commerce or digital marketing

Proven experience creating ad creatives, landing page visuals, and social content that actually ran

Strong command of Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects)

Experience with AI image generation tools (MidJourney, Leonardo, DALL·E, etc.)

Understanding of conversion-focused design, you know why visual hierarchy matters for an ad



Strong preference:



Health or wellness brand experience

Knowledge of direct-response marketing and what makes someone stop scrolling

Motion graphics or light video editing capability



- WHO THRIVES HERE:



You look at a high-performing ad and instinctively break down why it works.

You care about what happens after the asset goes live, not just whether the client approved it.

You understand that empathy, trust, and clarity aren't soft concepts in health marketing, they're conversion levers.

You want to help build a brand's visual identity over years, not just deliver a batch of assets.



- WHO THIS IS NOT FOR



If you're managing 8 clients simultaneously and fitting us in between, this isn't the right fit.

We want someone who is genuinely invested in one brand's growth, because that's where the real upside is.



- THE PROCESS



We review every application carefully. Portfolio quality matters far more than volume. If your work shows real DTC and direct-response experience, you'll hear from us fast.



We move quickly, but we don't rush decisions on people.



Start your application with the word "BLUEPRINT". it tells us you read this and you understand what we're actually building.

We're in this for the long game. We want you to be too.

/Instagram ad formats and platform behavior

- WHO THIS IS NOT FOR:
