title: Operations & CRM Virtual Assistant (Zoho Specialist)
description:
Taxi Mom LLC is a fast-growing company built on safety, structure, and reliability in student transportation. As we continue to expand, we are looking for a highly capable Operations & CRM Virtual Assistant who can support daily operations, maintain system accuracy, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks.



This is not a basic VA role — we need someone who can take ownership, communicate confidently, and adapt to a fast-paced, structured environment.



What You’ll Do

- Manage and maintain Zoho CRM (leads, follow-ups, quotes, and records — all within the system)

- Handle inbound and outbound calls with professionalism (parents, leads, partners)

- Support daily operations, scheduling, and coordination

- Ensure all data is accurate, updated, and organized

- Assist with invoicing, payment tracking, and basic bookkeeping tasks

- Identify gaps, missed steps, or inefficiencies and proactively address them



Requirements

- Hands-on experience with Zoho CRM (required)

- Strong customer service experience (required) — confident and professional on calls

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail

- Able to work independently and manage multiple priorities

- Adaptable and resourceful — able to support different operational and admin needs

- Strong communication skills (written and verbal)



Nice to Have

- Experience with QuickBooks or similar bookkeeping tools

- Background in operations or service-based businesses

- Social media support experience (basic posting/messaging)



What We’re Looking For:

We’re looking for someone who doesn’t just complete tasks, but steps in where needed, adjusts to shifting priorities, and acts as a reliable extension of the team. This role requires initiative, accountability, and a willingness to continuously learn and grow.

title: Marketing Content & Design
description:
Bud Ecosystem is building the next generation enterprise AI infrastructure. We are a growing company that values innovation, clarity, and impact. As we scale our marketing function, we need a creative and detail-oriented virtual assistant to help us produce corporate-quality collateral that reflects our brand identity across every touchpoint.



We are looking for a skilled Virtual Assistant to support the Head of Global Marketing in producing high-quality sales and marketing materials, advertising assets, and presentations. This role is ideal for a self-starter who combines strong design sensibility with marketing awareness and thrives on translating brand guidelines into polished, professional deliverables.

You will be a core part of our marketing build-out, working closely with leadership to ensure every piece of collateral meets a corporate standard and is consistently aligned with Bud Ecosystem’s brand identity.



Sales & Marketing Collateral

• Design and produce sales decks, one-pagers, case studies, brochures, and product sheets.

• Create and maintain templates for repeatable collateral (pitch decks, partner materials, leave-behinds).

• Support the development of sales enablement assets that empower the go-to-market team.

• Adapt existing content for different audiences, channels, and use cases while maintaining brand consistency.



Advertising & Campaign Assets

• Design digital ad creatives for paid social, display, and
 campaigns.

• Produce banner ads, social media graphics, and promotional visuals to spec.

• Resize, reformat, and version assets across platforms and placements.

• Collaborate with the marketing team to translate campaign briefs into compelling visual assets.



Presentations

• Build and refine executive presentations, investor decks, and internal briefing materials.

• Ensure consistent use of brand fonts, colors, imagery, and layout standards.

• Turn rough outlines or speaker notes into polished, narrative-driven slide decks.



Brand Stewardship

• Maintain and enforce brand guidelines across all produced materials.

• Organize and manage a shared library of brand assets, templates, and approved imagery.

• Flag deviations from brand standards and recommend corrections proactively.



Requirements: Must-Have

• 2+ years of experience producing marketing or sales collateral in a professional or agency setting.

• Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign).

• Working proficiency in Canva and Google Workspace (Slides, Docs, Sheets).

• Excellent eye for layout, typography, color, and visual hierarchy.

• Ability to work from brand guidelines and produce materials that are immediately corporate-ready.

• Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple deliverables and deadlines.

• Professional written communication in English.



Requirements: Nice-to-Have

• Experience in B2B, SaaS, or technology marketing environments.

• Familiarity with partner marketing and co-branded materials.

• Basic motion graphics or video editing skills 

• Experience with marketing automation or CMS platforms.

• Portfolio demonstrating corporate brand work across multiple asset types.



What Success Looks Like

• Every deliverable is polished, on-brand, and ready for external distribution without revision loops.

• Turnaround times are reliable, and you proactively flag bottlenecks or capacity issues.

• The sales and marketing team has a growing library of high-quality, reusable assets.

• Brand consistency improves measurably across all customer-facing materials.

title: Paid Ads Manager
description:
Position Overview



We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Paid Ads Manager / Agency Manager to oversee our law firm’s paid marketing efforts. This role is responsible for managing relationships with external advertising agencies, monitoring performance metrics, and ensuring all paid campaigns align with ethical standards and business objectives. The ideal candidate has strong experience in paid digital advertising, agency coordination, and KPI-driven performance management.



Key Responsibilities



Agency Oversight:

Supervise all paid advertising agencies (Google Ads,
/Meta, LinkedIn, etc.)

Conduct regular check-ins and strategy sessions with agency partners

Ensure agencies have the resources, assets, and information they need to succeed

Performance Monitoring:

Track and analyze key performance indicators (KPIs), including:

Cost per Lead (CPL)

Cost per Opportunity (CPO)

Cost per Deal (CPD)

Evaluate campaign effectiveness and ensure metrics are meeting targets or trending positively

Prepare performance reports and present key findings to the Director of Marketing

Creative Review and Compliance:

Review and approve all ad creatives and copy before launch

Ensure all advertising materials comply with legal marketing ethics and internal protocols

Collaborate with legal and compliance teams when necessary

Strategic Input:

Provide insights and recommendations to improve ad performance and ROI

Stay up-to-date with platform changes, advertising trends, and regulatory requirements

Contribute to the overall growth strategy of the firm’s marketing department

Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Advertising, Communications, or related field

3+ years of experience managing paid ad campaigns (law firm or professional services experience preferred)

Experience working with or managing marketing agencies

Proficient in paid media platforms (Google Ads, Meta Business Suite, LinkedIn Ads, etc.)

Strong analytical skills with experience using reporting tools (Google Analytics, Looker Studio, etc.)

Excellent communication and project management skills

Familiarity with legal advertising rules and ethical guidelines is a plus

Preferred Skills



Experience with CRM and lead tracking tools (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce)

Ability to manage budgets and allocate spend for maximum ROI

Knowledge of A/B testing, landing page optimization, and retargeting strategies

WHY JOIN ASHOORI LAW



Work for one of the top-rated U.S. immigration law firms



Fully remote work environment



Be part of a mission-driven, diverse, and supportive team



Opportunities for growth and professional development



Competitive compensation and performance incentives

title: Client Success Strategist/Digital Accounts Manager
description:
Role overview







The Digital Account Manager is the main point of contact for a portfolio of childcare and early years clients. Your job is to build trust, protect delivery quality, and keep every account moving forward with clarity and 
ntum. You will translate business goals into practical marketing plans, coordinate internal specialists, and make sure clients feel supported, informed, and confident in our work.



This is a relationship led role with strong operational discipline. You are expected to manage expectations, spot risks early, and communicate with warmth and authority. You will be accountable for retention, client satisfaction, and the smooth running of campaigns across paid ads, website work, content, and lead generation.



Key outcomes



Clients stay with us longer because they feel understood, guided, and well looked after



Campaigns are delivered on time with clear priorities and minimal rework



Clients understand what we are doing, why we are doing it, and what is happening next



Performance is reported honestly with insights and clear recommendations



The internal team is protected from chaos through good planning and strong communication



Responsibilities



Own the client relationship from onboarding through renewal



Run structured onboarding to understand the nursery’s priorities, capacity, location, fee structure, and enrolment goals







Turn goals into a clear marketing plan and translate that plan into deliverable tasks for the team



Lead client calls and meetings with confidence, strong agenda control, and clear follow ups



Coordinate work across paid media, creative, copy, SEO, web, and strategy







Keep the client informed without overwhelming them, balancing transparency with simplicity



Track performance and provide reporting that is accurate, meaningful, and actionable



Manage budgets and ensure paid media spend aligns with lead targets and seasonal demand



Spot issues early such as low lead quality, slow follow up, weak enquiry handling, or limited nursery capacity and raise them with solutions







Protect delivery by managing scope, avoiding last minute requests, and controlling priorities



Upsell and cross sell when it is genuinely in the client’s best interest



Work closely with leadership on retention, renewals, and account growth



Maintain clean documentation including notes, actions, timelines, and campaign plans



What great looks like in this role







You can speak fluently about the realities of nurseries, occupancy, waiting lists, term time demand, and parent decision making



You are calm, structured, and proactive even when a client is stressed



You manage expectations early so delivery stays clean and the team can do great work



You ask sharp questions and can identify the real problem behind what a client is requesting



You make clients feel cared for while still holding boundaries



You create 
ntum through consistent progress, not bursts of activity



Skills and experience







Proven experience managing client accounts in a marketing agency environment



Strong communication skills with the ability to lead calls and handle difficult conversations



Confident project coordination with an eye for detail and deadlines



Commercial awareness including retention, margin, and growth opportunities



Comfortable discussing paid advertising performance and basic funnel metrics



Strong writing skills for clear follow ups, briefs, and reporting



Ability to manage multiple accounts while keeping quality high



Experience in education, childcare, local services, or lead generation is a strong advantage



Personal qualities







Warm, professional, and genuinely client centered



Highly organized and naturally dependable



Assertive when needed and comfortable holding boundaries



Solutions focused and calm under pressure



Curious and coachable with a desire to improve







You will be part of a specialist agency focused entirely on helping nurseries and childcare settings grow sustainably. We care about doing the fundamentals exceptionally well, communicating clearly, and delivering work that genuinely improves enquiry volume and enrolments. You will be supported by a team of specialists and expected to lead accounts with maturity, structure, and care.

title: Full-Time Graphic Designer
description:
JOB TITLE: Full-Time Graphic & Web Designer



SHIFT: Night Shift (Philippines Time)

HOURS: 40 Hours per Week (Mon-Fri)

SALARY: $400 USD per Month during the probationary period (will increase based on performance)



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are a US-based digital marketing agency looking for a creative Full-Time Tea
mber to join our design department.



We need someone to handle our Graphic Design needs (both Print and Digital) as well as Website Design. You must be comfortable working with WordPress, preferably with Elementor.



We highly prefer someone who can work comfortably and efficiently with Canva for day-to-day digital assets, but you MUST still be fully proficient with Adobe software (like Photoshop and Illustrator) for more complex design work.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



-- GRAPHIC DESIGN (PRINT & DIGITAL)

You will handle all visual assets. This includes designing Print materials (flyers, menus, brochures with correct CMYK/bleeds) AND Digital assets (social media posts, ad banners, thumbnails) using a mix of Canva and Adobe software.



-- WEBSITE DESIGN

You will design and update responsive website pages and landing pages using WordPress and Elementor.



-- BRANDING

Ensure all designs match our brand guidelines.



REQUIREMENTS



Proficient in Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator (Mandatory), while also being highly comfortable working in Canva for design planning, presentation and collaborative works, and quicker tasks.



Proven experience in Graphic Design and Website Design (WordPress/Elementor).



Reliable PC and Internet capable of running heavy design software smoothly.



HOW TO APPLY



IMPORTANT: We will not review applications without a Portfolio.



Please send a message with the Subject Line: "Designer Application" and answer these questions:



How many years of design experience do you have?



How comfortable are you with building websites using WordPress and Elementor?



Are you comfortable and fast working within Canva for daily design tasks, while still being proficient in Photoshop/Illustrator?



Are you okay with the starting salary of $400 USD/month for the probationary period?



Are you able to work the Night Shift (Philippines Time)?



LINK TO PORTFOLIO: (Must include Print, Digital, and Website Design samples).

title: Business Development Manager
description:
We're looking for a highly organized and relationship-focused Business Development Manager to help manage and grow a large network of professional contacts in the entertainment industry (music, sports, film/TV, digital). This role is about meaningful outreach, follow-up, and building long-term trust across a large portfolio.



If you're detail-oriented, a strong communicator, and excited by the world of entertainment, this role could be a great fit. Must have good English writing abilities without use of AI. 



What You’ll Be Doing:



- Manage a High Volume of Contacts: Oversee a large list of professional accounts, ensuring regular communication and accurate recordkeeping.

- Outreach & Relationship Building: Proactively reach out to contacts via
 and social media to stay connected, share updates, and strengthen professional relationships.

- Craft Well-Written Messages: Write polished, thoughtful
s and messages in English—clear, natural communication is key.

- Track Progress: Use tools like HubSpot to manage follow-ups, keep conversations organized, and hit relationship-building goals.

- Work Toward Clear Targets: While there’s no selling involved, this role does have measurable outreach and engagement goals.

- Think Creatively: Develop new approaches for keeping relationships active, warm, and productive over time.



Who We’re Looking For:

- Excellent written English—you’re comfortable writing professional messages and outreach
s with clarity and polish. - - -- Must have strong English writing and speaking abilities.

- Extremely organized—you can juggle many accounts and keep your outreach and follow-ups on track.

- Self-motivated and driven—you take initiative, meet goals, and stay focused without constant supervision.

- Relationship-minded—you enjoy connecting with people and maintaining positive, long-term communication.

- Familiarity with CRM tools like HubSpot is a plus.

- Spanish fluency is a plus, but not required.

- A genuine interest in the entertainment industry—especially music, sports, film/TV, or digital media—will help you succeed in this role.

title: Virtual Front Desk & Insurance Verification Specialist (Camera-On Role)
description:
Job Overview



We are seeking a professional and reliable Virtual Front Desk & Insurance Verification Specialist to serve as the first point of contact for patients while supporting administrative and billing tasks. This is a camera-facing role, meaning you will interact with patients through video and represent the clinic in a professional and welcoming manner.



This position combines virtual front desk duties, insurance verification, and administrative support, including collections and patient account follow-ups.



Key Responsibilities



Front Desk (Primary Responsibility)



Serve as the virtual front desk representative and greet patients via video calls



Answer incoming calls and respond to patient inquiries professionally



Schedule and confirm appointments



Assist patients with forms, check-in procedures, and general questions



Maintain a friendly and professional camera presence at all times



Insurance Verification



Verify patient insurance eligibility and benefits



Confirm coverage details including copays, deductibles, and authorizations



Communicate insurance information to patients and clinic staff



Document verification results accurately in the system



Administrative Support



Assist with patient collections and account follow-ups



Support administrative and billing-related tasks as needed



Maintain accurate patient records and documentation



Help ensure smooth daily clinic operations



Qualifications



Previous experience in medical front desk, insurance verification, or healthcare administration preferred



Strong English communication skills (spoken and written)



Comfortable working in a camera-on environment and interacting with patients professionally



Strong organizational and multitasking skills



Detail-oriented with good documentation habits



Experience with EMR/EHR systems is a plus



Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace required



Ideal Candidate



Friendly and confident on camera



Professional and patient-focused



Organized and dependable



Comfortable handling both patient interaction and administrative work



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys interacting with patients while also handling structured administrative and insurance-related tasks.

title: Full-Time Video Editor (with After Effects Skills)
description:
SHIFT: Night Shift Preferred (Philippines Time) HOURS: 40 Hours per Week (Mon-Fri) SALARY: $500 USD per Month



ABOUT THE ROLE We are a US-based company looking for a creative Full-Time Tea
mber to join our media department.



We need a talented editor who can create high-impact, scroll-stopping content. You must be skilled in storytelling and have strong technical skills in Adobe After Effects to add polish and motion graphics to our videos. A knowledge in Final Cut Pro is a plus, but not required.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



-- SCROLL-STOPPING VIDEO EDITING You will transform raw footage into high-retention content. Your goal is to create videos that stop the scroll immediately. This involves fast-paced cuts, strategic storytelling, and engaging visuals.



-- ADOBE AFTER EFFECTS You will use After Effects to take our videos to the next level. This includes creating kinetic typography, animated lower thirds, logo reveals, and visual effects.



-- COLOR GRADING AND SOUND DESIGN You will handle professional color grading to give videos a specific look and mood. You will also manage sound design (selecting the right music, layering sound effects, and mixing audio) to create an immersive experience.



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



REQUIREMENTS



Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro AND Adobe After Effects. Final Cut skill pro is a plus but not required.



Proven experience in editing for social media (Reels/Shorts) and long-form content (YouTube).



Reliable PC capable of rendering 1080p/4K video without lagging.



*** IMPORTANT NOTE *** If you are shortlisted, we will ask you to complete a PAID TRIAL PROJECT to verify your skills. We pay for this trial.



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



HOW TO APPLY



We will not review applications without a Portfolio or Demo Reel.



Please send a message with the Subject Line: "Video Editor Application" and answer these 5 questions:



1. How many years of video editing experience do you have?



2. On a scale of 1-10, how proficient are you with Adobe After Effects?



3. Are you okay with the salary of $500 USD/month?



4. Are you available to work the Night Shift? (This is preferred).



5. LINK TO PORTFOLIO / DEMO REEL: (Must show examples of editing and motion graphics).

title: Full-Cycle Sales Rep (Cold Calling | US Market | Remote | Full-Time)
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a high-performing full-cycle sales representative to help us grow our client base.



This is an outbound sales role, focused on cold calling and closing deals.



You will:

• find companies that are hiring

• contact them directly

• and close deals



This is a long-term remote position with strong growth potential.



Important



This role involves daily cold calling.



You must be comfortable:

• speaking on the phone

• handling objections

• and closing deals



What You Will Do



• Call US, Germany. Canada and UK companies that are currently hiring

• Identify hiring needs

• Pitch our solution clearly

• Handle objections confidently

• Book calls or close deals

• Follow up via phone and

• Manage your own pipeline



What You Are Selling



We help companies hire pre-vetted remote full-time tea
mbers from:

• Philippines

• LATAM

• Eastern Europe



Our offer:

• Candidates ready within hours / days

• Strong screening and assessment process

• Up to 70–80% cost savings

• 6-month replacement guarantee (no risk)

• No need to post jobs or wait weeks



This makes the offer easy to sell.



Ideal Candidate



• Experience in cold calling (US market preferred)

• Strong English communication (spoken + written)

• Confident and persistent

• Able to handle rejection

• Self-driven and disciplined

• Strong closer mindset



English Requirement



You must have excellent English communication skills (near-native level).

You should be confident speaking with US clients on the phone.



Compensation



• Base salary: $500 – $1,000 USD per month (depending on experience)

• Commission: $200 – $300 per closed deal

• Additional performance bonuses possible



This role is performance-driven.

Strong performers can earn significantly more through commission.



Tools



• CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar)

• Google Workspace

• Phone / VoIP tools

• Slack / Zoom



Work Setup



• Fully remote

• Full-time (40 hours per week)

• Must be available during US working hours



Application Process



• Application review

• Short screening

• Video interview

• Final selection



To Apply (Important)



Start your application with: READY



Include:

• A short video introduction (60–90 seconds)

• Your sales experience

• Your experience with cold calling

• Your experience with closing deals

• Your years of experience

• Your expected monthly salary (USD)

• Confirmation that you are available full-time

• How many calls you can make per day

• How you would generate leads

• What conversion rates you expect



This will help us better understand how you think and work.



Send your application to: 



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.



Final Note



We are building a fast-growing international business.



We value:

• speed

• performance

• results



If you are a strong closer, this is a great opportunity to grow with us.

title: Senior Level Executive Assistant
description:
I’m looking for a high-performing Executive Partner who can act as my strategic right hand — someone who thrives on structure, communication, and follow-through.



This isn’t a typical “assistant” role. I’m looking for a growth catalyst — a professional who can think strategically, manage systems, and execute with precision so I can stay focused on scaling, sales, design, and client relationships.



If you’re detail-oriented, confident, and thrive in fast-paced environments, I want to work with you.



What You’ll Do



Execution & Ownership

Take projects from concept to completion — no loose ends.

Build SOPs, follow through proactively, and close loops without needing reminders.



Communication Management

Manage my inbox and messages with a quick response turnaround.

Draft professional, client-ready messages and communications.

Capture and distribute key action items fro
etings.



Calendar & Scheduling

Protect my time through assertive calendar management.

Confirm, organize, and enforce commitments while anticipating potential conflicts.



Systems & Reporting

Maintain CRM data, track pipelines, and update dashboards regularly.

Turn raw data into actionable insights using Excel, CRMs, and BI tools.



Process & Change Management

Design and document workflows for consistency and scale.

Test, track, and implement process improvements responsibly.



Security & Access Management

Oversee system access, ensuring secure onboarding/offboarding and best security practices.



Daily Communication Rhythm

Send clear updates: morning priorities, post-meeting summaries, midday check-ins (if needed), and end-of-day completion reports.



You’re the Ideal Fit If You Have

Proven experience supporting C-level executives or senior leadership.

Strong organizational, communication, and project management skills.

Confidence to push commitments forward and hold accountability.

Experience working with CRMs, dashboards, and reporting tools.

A process-oriented mindset with strong attention to detail.

The ability to thrive in fast-paced, entrepreneurial environments.



Key Attributes

Reliable, execution-driven, and results-focused.

Assertive yet professional in communication.

Adaptable and resilient during high-demand seasons.

Proud of your contribution as an indispensable growth partner.

Customer-first mindset — ensuring seamless client and team experiences.



Success in This Role Looks Like

Inbox and messages triaged within 2 hours.

Meetings and follow-ups handled without my intervention.

CRM and reporting dashboards always accurate and up to date.

Documented processes that drive clarity and consistency.

I’m operating in my zone of genius, focused on growth — because you’ve got everything else handled.



Bonus: Good at using AI tools

title: Assistant Contract Analyst
description:
Position Summary



The Assistant Contract Analyst supports the Vice President of Compliance in managing the lifecycle of company contracts and agreements. This role focuses on contract preparation, review, tracking, and compliance oversight to reduce operational and legal risk. The position coordinates across departments to ensure contracts are accurate, compliant, and executed efficiently.



 



Essential Duties and Responsibilities



Assist with drafting, formatting, proofreading, and redlining company contracts and agreements.



Review contracts for accuracy, completeness, and consistency with company standards.



Prepare contract packages using Adobe tools and standardized templates.



Support the VP of Compliance and legal counsel with contract revisions and execution.



Identify missing documentation or contract risks and escalate appropriately.



Ensure contracts comply with applicable state regulations, licensing requirements, and company standards.



 



Technical Skills



Strong proficiency in Adobe Acrobat editing and redlining required.



Proficiency in Microsoft Word contract formatting required.



Excel proficiency required, including the ability to create, manage, and analyze tracking spreadsheets.



Experience with Smartsheet or similar project tracking systems preferred.



Comfort working with digital document management systems.



 



Experience



3 to 5 years of experience in contract administration, compliance, or the construction industry required. Roofing industry experience is strongly preferred.



Education



Bachelor’s degree preferred or equivalent relevant experience.



 



This position description is not intended to be an exhaustive list of duties. Responsibilities may change based on business needs.

title: Licensing and Compliance Coordinator
description:
The Licensing & Compliance Coordinator plays a critical role within the organization by providing administrative and licensing support to the Company and guaranteeing the Company’s compliance with renewing and maintaining corporate, contractor, and local-level licensing. This role will report directly to the VP of Compliance.



 



Responsibilities:



Provide professional licensing support to the company and its subsidiaries and ensure that all required professional licenses are obtained and kept in good standing.



Ensure proper and timely completion of all licensing requirements for Corporate and all Brands, including the preparation and filing of license applications.



Apply for new licenses as needed on a state and local level.



Send and upload COIs to proper licensing offices, localities, and Brand Markets.



Assist the various brands company-wide with the COI platform.



Respond to questions from company personnel regarding licensing requirements.



Maintain up-to-date knowledge of all relevant corporate, state, and federal licensing requirements.



Retain accurate and organized records of all licensing documents.



Provide administrative support to the VP of compliance.



Qualifications:



A minimum of 2 years prior experience in license management, regulatory compliance, or a related field is advantageous.



Knowledge of contractor Licensing and Permitting processes



Excellent written and verbal communication skills



Knowledge of Certificate of Insurance processes and procedures



Strong computer proficiency



Superb attention to detail.



Experience working in a fast-paced environment with changing priorities and goals.



Organized, detailed, and self-motivated.



Ability to multitask and problem-solving.



Works well in a team environment as well as independently.



Demonstrated ability to adapt to new information, research for information, and apply knowledge learned.



Ability to follow directions and complete detailed forms with accuracy.



Strong analytical and detail-oriented aptitude; a high degree of accuracy is required.

title: Publisher / Publishing Operations Manager
description:
Innovative Publishing – Remote



We’re looking for an experienced Publisher / Publishing Operations Manager to help run day-to-day publishing operations for our growing book company. This role works directly with the CEO and requires someone who understands the full publishing lifecycle and can manage projects independently with minimal supervision.



This is not an entry-level role. We’re seeking a detail-oriented professional with real publishing experience, strong execution skills, and the ability to keep multiple book projects moving forward on schedule.



What You’ll Do:

- Manage book projects from manuscript to publication and release

- Coordinate with editors, designers, formatters, and marketing partners

- Prepare, upload, and manage titles on Amazon KDP, IngramSpark, and other publishing platforms

- Oversee production timelines, deliverables, and basic project budgets

- Maintain clear, professional communication with authors throughout the publishing process

- Manage author contracts, manuscripts, assets, and internal publishing records

- Collaborate with the marketing team on launch timelines and promotional planning

- Track sales performance and assist with basic royalty reporting

- Support the acquisition and onboarding of new authors and book projects



Requirements (Please Read Carefully)

To be considered, you must have:

- At least 1 year of hands-on experience in book publishing or publishing operations

- Direct experience managing multiple book projects simultaneously

- Working knowledge of Amazon KDP and IngramSpark (uploads, metadata, revisions, updates)

- Strong organizational and project-management skills

- Excellent written communication skills (author-facing)

- The ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and problem-solve without constant oversight



Nice to Have:

- Experience working with independent or hybrid publishers

- Familiarity with ISBNs, metadata optimization, and print/digital formats

- Experience coordinating book launches and marketing timelines

- Understanding of royalty structures and sales tracking



How to Apply:

To apply, please submit the following:



- Your resume or portfolio highlighting relevant publishing experience

- A 2-minute Loom video answering this question:

“What part of the publishing process are you most experienced in, and why?”



???? Send your Loom video link via
 to:

- 

- 



????
 Subject Line (Required):

Publisher Application – [Your Full Name]



?? Applications that are incomplete, do not follow instructions, are vague, or clearly AI-generated without real experience will not be considered.

title: Publicity Coordinator / PR Support Specialist
description:
Publicity Coordinator / PR Support Specialist (Remote)



We’re seeking a long-term, remote Publicity Coordinator / PR Support Specialist to assist with media outreach, publicity administration, press release drafting, newsletter creation, and campaign coordination across multiple cultural and publishing projects.



This role is ideal for someone with at least 1 year of PR or media outreach experience who is highly committed, detail-oriented, and excited to grow with the company long term.



Current & Upcoming Projects Include

- ICONIC BEATS: Easy Mo Bee’s Unforgettable Tracks for Biggie, Tupac, & Hip-Hop’s Greatest

- Hip-Hop 50th Birthday Campaigns (August)

 and light phone outreach (scripts provided)

nts, releases, and current events

- Minimum 1 year experience in PR, publicity, media outreach, or related support roles

- Strong writing skills, especially for press releases and media correspondence

- Familiarity with African American culture, hip-hop, and entertainment media

- Knowledge of Black media outlets, cultural trends, and community platforms is a plus

- Experience with virtual assistance, administrative support, or CRM tools

- Comfortable with professional follow-ups via
 and phone

- Proficient in Microsoft Office & Google Docs, Sheets, and shared tracking tools (or willing to learn)

- Detail-oriented, self-motivated, and able to manage multiple campaigns remotely

- Seeking a long-term PR professional who is highly committed, reliable, and consistent with their work

- Available to work Monday–Friday during EST business hours

- Reliable internet connection and ability to work independently



Application Requirement – Short Video Introduction:

- To be considered, applicants must submit a 1–2 minute video introduction covering:

Applications without a video introduction will not be considered.



Compensation:

- Base Rate: $5/hour USD



Incentive Increases: Up to $9/hour USD, based on:

- Demonstrated PR writing experience (press release samples)

- Proven media outreach or placement success

- Ability to independently manage outreach campaigns

- Project Bonuses: Available for securing major placements, podcast bookings, or influencer collaborations

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Credit Repair Specialist
description:
Credit Specialist | Credit Rescue Solutions | REMOTE | Full-Time



Are you a skilled Credit Repair Specialist with experience in the American credit system- Do you have a passion for helping individuals and businesses secure funding and financial freedom- If so, we want YOU on our team!



I’m Gene Ryland, the founder of Credit Rescue Solutions, a B2B accelerator that has helped over 50 clients in the past year access business funding and improve their financial standing. We’re looking to scale to 15+ new clients per month—and we need a top-tier Credit Specialist to make that happen.



This is a remote, full-time position requiring availability during EST business hours (9 AM - 5 PM EST, Monday-Friday).



Who We're Looking For

We are searching for a dedicated, detail-oriented, and highly motivated Credit Specialist with at least one year of experience in the U.S. credit repair industry. You must have a strong understanding of credit reports, dispute processes, and funding strategies. If you have a track record of helping clients boost their credit scores, remove inaccurate negative items, and obtain funding, you’re exactly who we need!



Key Responsibilities

- Credit Repair & Disputes: Work with Dispute Fox software to challenge and remove inaccurate negative items on client credit reports.

- Client Support: Guide clients through the credit repair process, answer questions, and provide education on maintaining a strong credit profile.

- Business Funding Preparation: Help clients optimize their credit profiles to qualify for funding opportunities.

- Communication & Reporting: Work directly with the CEO to report progress, challenges, and solutions.

- Compliance & Best Practices: Ensure all dispute processes follow legal and ethical guidelines under the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA).



What We Offer

- Competitive Pay + Performance-Based Bonuses (Earn more for great results!)

- 100% Remote Work (Work from the comfort of your home!)

- High-Growth Opportunity (Be part of a company scaling from 50 to 1,000+ clients!)

- Collaborative & Fun Team Culture (We take our work seriously but have fun doing it!)

- Impactful Work (You’ll be changing people’s lives by helping them unlock financial opportunities!)



Minimum Qualifications

- Fluent English Speaker & Writer (Clear communication is a must!)

- 1+ Years Experience in U.S. Credit Repair (You must understand credit disputes, inquiries, and the funding process.)

- Experience with Dispute Fox Software (Or the ability to learn it quickly.)

- Excellent Decision-Making & Problem-Solving Skills (You’ll be handling complex credit situations.)

- High Emotional Intelligence & Resilience (You’ll be working with clients facing financial challenges.)

- Strong Organizational Skills & Attention to Detail (Credit repair requires precision!)

- Ability to Work EST Business Hours (9 AM - 5 PM EST, Monday-Friday)



How to Apply (Follow These Steps Carefully!)

---- Subject Line Must Include: "Terminator" (This helps us filter serious applicants!)

---- Attach Your Resume (Show us your experience and skills!)

---- Write a Short Message on why you’re the perfect fit for this role.



---- We are conducting interviews THIS WEEK! If you're a hard worker who thrives in a fast-paced, high-impact role, apply today and join our world-class team!



Looking forward to connecting,

Gene Ryland

Founder, Credit Rescue Solutions

title: Video Editor

title: Operations Manager for eCommerce Agency
description:
We are a growing eCommerce agency working with multiple international clients, and we are looking for a sharp, highly organized, and high-energy Operations Manager who can also handle project management at a strong level.



This is a very important role inside the business.



You will be the person responsible for helping keep the agency organized, making sure tasks are clearly delegated, deadlines are met, communication is strong, and team output is high quality. This is not a passive role and not a basic admin role. We need someone who can think fast, move fast, lead properly, and keep the team aligned.



This role is best for someone who has real experience in operations, team management, project management, eCommerce, and client communication.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Operations and Team Management



-Manage the day-to-day operations of the agency

-Oversee remote tea
mbers and make sure everyone is aligned and productive

-Delegate tasks clearly and properly based on priority and skill level

-Follow up with tea
mbers to make sure tasks are moving and deadlines are being met

-Spot bottlenecks, delays, and weak performance early and address them fast

-Help improve accountability, structure, and overall team discipline



Project Management



-Take client requests, meeting notes, Loom videos, and feedback and turn them into clear, actionable tasks

-Assign tasks inside ClickUp or other project management tools with proper context, deadlines, and priorities

-Make sure tasks are not just posted, but actually understood by the team

-Keep projects moving forward without needing constant follow-up from the owner

-Ensure urgent tasks are handled on time and important items do not get delayed



Quality Control and Delivery



-Review work before it goes back to the client

-Make sure deliverables are accurate, polished, and aligned with what the client asked for

-Catch mistakes, weak output, or missing details before submission

-Maintain strong internal quality control across all active client projects



Client Communication



-Help manage client communication in a professional, clear, and confident way

-Send updates, follow-ups, and replies on time

-Make sure clients feel taken care of, updated, and supported

-Understand the client’s priorities and communicate them clearly to the team



Systems and Process Improvement



-Improve internal workflows and agency systems

-Help build better SOPs, structure, and processes

-Suggest ways to make the business more efficient

-Identify areas where automation or better systems can save time and improve delivery



What We’re Looking For



-Proven experience as an Operations Manager, Project Manager, or similar leadership role

-Strong experience in eCommerce, websites, and digital marketing environments

-Excellent written and verbal English communication

-Strong leadership and delegation skills

-Very organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

-Able to work with urgency and manage multiple moving parts

-Strong problem-solving ability

-Comfortable managing remote teams

-Comfortable using tools like ClickUp, Slack, Google Workspace, Loom, and similar platforms

-Able to take ownership and reduce the owner’s workload, not add to it



Big Plus If You Have Experience With



-Shopify

-WordPress

-Klaviyo

-Customer support workflows

-Order processing

-Inventory updates

-Canva or basic design coordination

-CRM and automation tools

-Agency operations

-Managing multiple client accounts at once



Important for This Role



This is a full-time, high-focus role inside a small but growing agency.



Because this position is crucial to daily operations, we are looking for someone who can give this role their full attention and energy. You must not have other jobs or active side commitments that will affect your focus, availability, or performance here.



We need someone fully committed, dependable, responsive, and ready to take real ownership.



Who This Role Is For



This role is for someone who:



-likes structure

-can lead people properly

-knows how to manage pressure

-can keep projects organized

-communicates clearly

-has strong urgency

-takes pride in keeping the business running smoothly



This is not for someone who only wants to post tasks, wait for instructions, or do the bare minimum.



Position Details



-Full-time

-Long-term

-Remote

-High ownership role

-Growth opportunity for the right person



How to Apply



To show that you actually read this job post, include the word juice in your cover letter.



Please send:



-Your resume

-A short cover letter explaining your relevant experience

-Why you are a strong fit for this role

-The tools and platforms you have worked with

-Your previous experience managing teams, projects, or agency operations

-If you have strong operations and project management experience in an eCommerce or digital agency setting, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Project Coordinator - Remote
description:
About Us



Lushomo is a data, design, and communication agency working with international organisations on reports, infographics, and digital products.



We operate in a fast-moving, multi-project environment where clarity, responsiveness, and organisation are critical to delivering high-quality work.



---



The Role



We are looking for a highly organised, proactive, and reliable Project Coordinator to ensure our projects are properly set up, clearly structured, and consistently moving forward.



This is not a routine admin role — it requires strong thinking, organisation, and ownership.



You will act as a central coordination point across multiple projects, making sure:

- nothing is missed  

- communication is timely  

- projects are always clear and up to date  



---



 Key Responsibilities



 1. Client Communication (High Priority)

- Ensure all client
s are acknowledged within 24 hours  

- Follow up internally to ensure responses are completed  

- Draft clear, professional
 responses when needed  



---



 2. Project Setup & Quality Control

- Ensure every project is properly set up at the start  

- Check that key elements are in place:

  - Product brief  

  - Treatment overview  

  - Clear milestones and timelines  

  - Quality control gateways  

- Work with Project Managers to ensure consistency and completeness  



---



 3. Project Oversight (ClickUp)

- Ensure every project clearly shows:

  - next actions  

  - assigned owners  

  - deadlines  

- Monitor projects to ensure ClickUp reflects reality  

- Flag missing information, gaps, or unclear steps  



(Project Managers maintain their projects — your role is to ensure clarity and consistency.)



---



 4. Daily Coordination & Follow-Up

- Track progress across multiple projects  

- Follow up on overdue or unclear tasks  

- Flag risks or delays early  

- Help move projects forward by prompting next steps  



---



 5. Supporting Project Delivery

- Help initiate workstreams (e.g. ensuring designers are briefed and ready to start)  

- Support drafting of basic briefs or coordination materials  

- Ensure smooth handovers between stages and tea
mbers  



---



 Working Hours



- Based in the Philippines (remote)  

- Working hours should include at least 3–4 hours overlap with Central European Time (CET)  

- Preferred schedule: approximately 13:00–21:00 (PH time)  

- You will help ensure projects and communications are prepared for the next working day  



---



 What Success Looks Like



- No client
s go unanswered  

- Every project is properly set up and clearly structured  

- All projects have clear next steps at all times  

- Delays are identified early and addressed  

-  Project Managers spend less time on coordination and more time on high-value work



---



 Requirements



- Excellent written and spoken English  

- Strong organisational and time management skills  

- High attention to detail  

- Confident following up with tea
mbers  

- Comfortable using tools such as ClickUp, Slack, and Google Drive  

- Able to manage multiple projects at once  



---



 Key Traits We Are Looking For



- Proactive — you take initiative without waiting to be told  

- Assertive — comfortable chasing updates and asking questions  

- Reliable — you follow through consistently  

- Structured — you like clarity, order, and well-defined processes  

- Calm under pressure  



---



 Nice to Have



- Experience in project coordination, operations, or delivery roles  

- Experience working with international teams  

- Experience in creative, design, or digital environments  



---



 Salary



- Competitive salary based on experience  

- Full-time remote role  



---



 Application Instructions



To apply, please send us your CV, and include:

- A cover letter with a short paragraph (5–8 sentences) explaining how you would organise a project with multiple deadlines and tea
mbers to ensure nothing is missed.

- At the very top of your application, include the word:

“Banana”

- Your expected monthly salary (full-time)



Applications that do not follow all of these instructions will not be considered.



---



We are hiring quickly and will review applications on a rolling basis..

title: Production Graphic Designer & Wireframing Assistant (InDesign, Illustrator, Detail-Oriented)
description:
We are a small international team working on data visualisation, infographics, and reports for organisations such as international agencies and NGOs. We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented graphic designer to help us turn structured content, wireframes, and rough ideas into clean, professional layouts using Adobe InDesign and Illustrator.



This is not a highly creative or conceptual role. You will follow templates, structured briefs, and clear visual systems. Attention to detail, consistency, and the ability to follow instructions carefully are more important than creativity. In addition to production design, you will also support early-stage work by turning rough notes, sketches, or Loom videos into clear, structured wireframes and layout drafts.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Production layout/ design:

- Create layouts for infographics, reports, and presentations  

- Work mainly in Adobe InDesign and Adobe Illustrator  

- Follow clear briefs, templates, and visual direction  

- Apply consistent spacing, alignment, typography, heading levels, document setup, and hyperlinks/ cross links  

- Perform a final self-check before submission (spelling, alignment, consistency, formatting)  

- Deliver clean, well-organised files (including clear layer structure and file naming)  



Wireframing / Layout Support:

- Create simple wireframes and layout drafts based on rough notes, sketches, or Loom videos  

- Translate ideas into clear, structured visual layouts (e.g. using Miro or similar tools)  

- Improve clarity, organisation, and hierarchy without changing the core concept  



REQUIREMENTS

Essential:

- Strong skills in Adobe InDesign and Adobe Illustrator  

- Good understanding of layout, hierarchy, and typography  

- Comfortable working with detailed instructions, templates, and checklists  

- Ability to follow instructions carefully and check your own work  

- Good written English  

- Reliable and responsive  



Nice to have:

- Experience with infographics or reports  

- Experience working with international clients  

- Familiarity with Miro, Figma, or similar tools for wireframing  

- Experience working with structured design systems or templates  



What We Are Looking For:

We are not looking for highly experimental or artistic work.

We are looking for someone who:

- Produces clean, precise, professional layouts  

- Pays close attention to detail  

- Is comfortable working within clear guidelines and templates  

- Can turn rough ideas into clear, structured wireframes/layouts  

- Can improve spacing, hierarchy, and organisation  

- Is comfortable doing sometimes repetitive work to a high standard  



Working Arrangement:

- Remote (work from home)  

- Initially part-time, starting with a small number of guaranteed hours (approx. 10–20 hours per month)  

- Additional work will be available from the start  

- Strong opportunity for this role to grow into a larger, long-term position over time  



Salary:

Competitive rate based on experience. We are open to both junior and mid-level candidates.



Test Task:

Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a paid test task (2–3 hours).



You will be given:

- A production design task (layout, clean-up and formatting)  

- A simple wireframing task based on rough input  

We will evaluate accuracy, consistency, organisation, and attention to detail.



How to Apply

Please include:

- A link to your portfolio with 2–3 examples of reports, infographics, or layout-heavy work  

- A short note explaining your experience with InDesign and Illustrator  

- Your answer to this question: What steps do you take to check your work before submitting?  

- To confirm you have read this post carefully, please begin your application with the word LAYOUT

title: Financial & Business Operations Associate (Part-Time )
description:
Part-Time | Growth-Oriented Venture Role



Job Overview



Capacity: 8–10 hours per week initially



Location: Primarily remote (Philippines-based)



Travel: Occasional domestic site visits (expenses covered)



Focus: Venture evaluation, operational structuring, and international coordination



About the Role



I am building and testing several early-stage business initiatives in the Philippines and am seeking a sharp, analytical professional to help evaluate and structure them.



This is not a standard bookkeeping role. This is a venture evaluation and operations role for someone who wants to understand how businesses are tested, improved, and scaled from the ground up.



The initial assignment involves evaluating a small agricultural venture in the Visayas-Mindanao region. There are minimal formal records in place.



Your task will be to determine:



Is this venture economically viable?



What are the true unit economics and cost drivers?



Should we scale, improve, pivot, or discontinue the project?



Growth Pathway



Beyond the initial farm project, responsibilities may expand into:



Designing structured market research systems for U.S. companies studying emerging Southeast Asian consumers



Organizing workflows and validation processes for AI-driven initiatives



Synthesizing field data into clear reports for U.S.-based stakeholders



Building repeatable frameworks for evaluating early-stage ventures



What You’ll Do



Conduct site visits and convert physical operations into structured financial data



Build simple, practical tracking systems (ClickUp or similar tools are a plus)



Analyze margins, cost drivers, and sustainability



Provide clear, direct recommendations on project viability



Coordinate research and validate information for new initiatives



Work independently and communicate findings concisely



Who This Role Suits



You may be a strong fit if you:



Have a degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or Business (CPA welcome but not required)



Think analytically and enjoy solving ambiguous problems



Are comfortable working independently



Communicate clearly across different types of stakeholders



Are curious about international business and technology



Fluency in Cebuano or Surigaonon is an advantage for field work but not required.



Compensation & Location



Philippines-based applicants only



Cebu, Davao, and Visayas/Mindanao candidates preferred for ease of travel



Primarily remote, with occasional site visits (expenses covered)



Compensation is project-based and aligned with an early-stage growth role.

Please include your expected hourly rate in your application.



How to Apply



 

 with:



Your resume



Your location



Your expected hourly rate



A short paragraph explaining why early-stage business evaluation interests you.

title: Paid Ads Partner (Meta & Google)
description:
We’re a local, service-based business looking for a paid ads partner, not a “monitor the dashboard and send a report” type.



Some of our ad accounts are tidy.

Some of them are… spaghetti.



If you enjoy untangling things, or knowing when to bin them and rebuild properly,  you’ll enjoy this.



We care far more about clear thinking and good judgement than job titles or buzzwords.



What this role actually is



You’ll own strategy and execution across Meta and Google Ads.



Your job is to help turn paid traffic into booked intro sessions, and booked intros into real people turning up.



I’ll handle coaching, sales, and conversion.

You handle making the ads make sense.



What you’ll be doing



Plan, build, and launch Meta 
/Instagram) and Google Ads campaigns



Clean up and restructure historical campaigns so accounts are logical and manageable



Actively optimise week by week (keywords, audiences, creatives, budgets, messaging)



Work with existing assets and lead or guide ad creatives



Help set up a simple, clear dashboard (nothing over-engineered)



Explain what’s working, what’s not, and what you’re changing next



TikTok Ads may come later...  but only once the foundations are solid.



Creatives (important bit)



You don’t need to be a designer.

You do need to be comfortable leading or collaborating on creatives.



That might mean:



Writing or refining ad copy



Repurposing existing photos or videos into ads



Briefing angles or hooks for short-form video



Improving creatives over time instead of waiting for “perfect assets”



If you need everything handed to you fully formed, this won’t be a fit.



Experience we’re looking for



Solid hands-on PPC experience (years matter less than judgement)



Comfortable making decisions with imperfect data and real budgets



Confident building from scratch and fixing messy or underperforming accounts



Strong understanding of user behaviour, intent, and lead quality



Experience with local or service-based lead generation is a big plus



This isn’t a junior role, but it’s also not about ego or theory.



Tools you should be comfortable with



Google Ads



Meta Ads Manager



GA4 (for sanity-checking behaviour, not vanity metrics)



Solid understanding of tracking (Pixel / GTM awareness)



We use GoHighLevel for leads and funnels.



Time & budget



Initial 3-month trial



Month 1: more hours may be needed for build-out (to be agreed)



Months 2–3: 5 hours per week



$10–$15 USD per hour, depending on fit



Short weekly or fortnightly check-in around 11am GMT



Monthly ad spend is typically around $1,000 USD, so efficiency matters



What this role is not



“Set and forget”



Social media posting



SEO or content writing



Fancy reports nobody reads



To apply, tell me:



A brief example of a local or service-based lead gen campaign you’ve managed



What you’d focus on in your first 30 days with a $1,000 ad budget



How you usually handle ad creatives (create, guide, collaborate, repurpose)



If you like thinking clearly, working with real constraints, and turning chaos into something usable, you’ll fit in well.



We don’t need perfection, but we love progress.



- Lee

title: STRUCTURAL ENGINEER / STATICIAN
description:
JOB ADVERTISEMENT – STRUCTURAL ENGINEER / STATICIAN (REMOTE)



FingerHug, a company based in Bosnia and Herzegovina specializing in architectural design, technical development, structural planning, and project support, is expanding its team and is looking for an experienced Structural Engineer / Statician for a remote position.



We are looking for a highly skilled, responsible, and self-driven professional with strong expertise in structural design, analysis, and evaluation, who can contribute to the technical development of projects with precision, reliability, and a deep understanding of structural safety and construction logic.



Requirements and qualifications:

• minimum 10 years of experience in the same or similar roles 

• strong professional background in structural engineering and static analysis 

• proven experience in the design, review, and evaluation of structural systems for residential or commercial buildings 

• solid understanding of reinforced concrete, steel, and other structural elements 

• ability to perform structural calculations and assess load-bearing systems, stability, and overall structural performance 

• experience in reviewing structural drawings, technical documentation, and execution-related details 

• strong understanding of construction methods, structural behavior, and applicable engineering standards 

• ability to identify practical, safe, and efficient structural solutions 

• proficiency in relevant engineering and technical software; knowledge of AutoCAD and structural analysis tools is expected 

• strong computer skills 

• active command of the English language, both written and spoken 

• strong organizational and communication skills 

• independence, responsibility, and a professional approach to work 

• ability to work both independently and as part of a team in a remote environment 



Key responsibilities:

title: Civil Engineer
description:
JOB ADVERTISEMENT – CIVIL ENGINEER (REMOTE)



FingerHug, a company based in Bosnia and Herzegovina specializing in architectural design, technical development, construction planning, and project support, is expanding its team and is looking for an experienced Civil Engineer for a remote position.



We are looking for a highly skilled, responsible, and self-driven professional with strong practical and technical knowledge of construction, especially from an execution and contractor’s perspective. The ideal candidate should be able to contribute to the technical planning, assessment, and development of projects with a clear understanding of structures, quantities, materials, and real construction requirements.



Requirements and qualifications:

• minimum 10 years of experience in the same or similar roles 

• strong professional background in civil engineering and construction execution 

• solid knowledge of structural systems, construction methods, and building materials 

• proven experience in preparing bills of quantities, quantity take-offs, and material assessments 

• ability to accurately calculate required quantities of key construction materials, including concrete, reinforcement steel, and other structural elements 

• strong understanding of contractor-side processes, site logic, and construction planning 

• ability to read, review, and interpret technical drawings, construction details, and project documentation 

• proficiency in relevant engineering software; knowledge of AutoCAD and similar technical tools is expected 

• strong computer skills 

• active command of the English language, both written and spoken 

• strong organizational and communication skills 

• independence, responsibility, and a professional approach to work 

• ability to work both independently and as part of a team in a remote environment 



Key responsibilities:

• reviewing and analyzing technical and construction documentation 

• preparing and verifying bills of quantities and material take-offs 

• supporting the technical evaluation of structural and construction solutions 

• contributing practical construction knowledge from an execution perspective 

• collaborating with the team to ensure technically sound, realistic, and efficient project solutions 

• helping align technical planning with execution realities, project requirements, and applicable standards 

• staying up to date with current construction practices, standards, and regulations 



What we offer:

• stable employment

title: NDIS Bookkeeper
description:

title: Social Media Marketer
description:
We are hiring a new Social Media Strategist for our Agency and you will help us to create viral Reels and manage the accounts of our clients to grow them to higher numbers and scale our agency. We 4x our revenue last month and with this foundation we want to scale even higher now, so we need an experienced Social Media Marketing Strategist to maintain the quality for our clients. If you already have experience with Social Media (Short Form Content on Instagram Reels), you are creative, know how to create video concepts that go viral and how to analyse viral videos, this job is perfect for you.



Why you should work with us:



- You start with established personal brands - The client(s) you will work with, have proven concepts, so you can build on a solid foundation and use the style of their existing videos to develop even better concepts.

- AI Implementation - AI is becoming more and more relevant and we are already using AI for many different areas, especially for content (picture/video) creation, so you are up to date with AI for social media while other companies don’t use AI at all. So you are 3 steps ahead.

- Different projects - Step by step you will work with different accounts / clients so you can be creative in different areas.

- Long Term partnership - We are only looking for long term employees, so you will work with us for a long time and have a stable income with a growing agency.

- Established Agency - Our agency is active since 2022, so we gained a lot of experience in all fields of social media, so you will learn from our experience which will help you to improve your social media skills.

- Clear guides and onboarding - You will clear instructions on how to do you work in a detailed onboarding and training. Combined with your own knowledge we will make sure to have the best results.



Your specific task:



You have 3 daily main tasks to focus on, besides that you will get more different tasks over the time when we see that you’re doing a great job:



1. Market Research - You go through the market and find viral Reels / Trends from other creators that have potential to go viral for our clients

2. Concept Creation - Based on your research you create the specific video concepts that our content team / clients should create.

3. Analyse our videos - Not only looking for new concepts is important but also analysing our own accounts and videos, finding winning patterns and implementing these information in the concept creation.



Other potential tasks in the future that give you more responsibility:



- Team Management - We have a big team for reposting content, where we need support with employee onboarding, technical setups and video creation

- More clients - Depending on your workload you will work with more of our clients and help with more different concepts

- Implementing complete new ideas - Your main task is to improve our current system but we always have new ideas, new concepts and new strategies that we need to implement and test with our existing systems.



What we expect and need from you:



- Experience with Social Media / Short Form video creation. Not only uploading simple posts for companies but actual experience and skills in video conception for content that goes viral and analysing viral videos.

- Experience in the Online Marketing Space. This is not a beginner job and you should know how social media is used in the business world.

- 7 Days / week. This is a well paid job, so we are looking for a high performing employee.

- Fluent English (speaking & writing) since our clients are mainly from USA.



Salary and Perspective:



Since we are looking for the best employee for this job, we start with a salary of $800 per month. In the future there is a chance for more if you do a good job and you help us to reach our company goals. Depending on your skills and results you can get more responsibility and more projects.



If you’re looking for a long term job, then message me here with the code word “smms” in your application :)

title: Xero Bookkeeper & VAT Tracking Assistant (2 UK Companies)
description:
Overview: 



We run a busy martial arts fitness business in the UK with two limited companies.



I’m looking for someone organised and reliable to:



keep Xero accurate and up to date

handle journals between the two companies properly

and help me stay on top of our VAT position (Flat Rate Scheme)



This is a small role, but it’s important. I’m not looking for someone I need to chase, I’m looking for someone who stays on top of things and flags issues early.



What You’ll Do

Weekly / Ongoing

Reconcile bank transactions in Xero

Reconcile Stripe / PayPal / GoCardless payouts

Match receipts using Dext

Keep both Xero accounts clean and up to date

Monthly



1. Intercompany Journals (Important)



Post journals between the two companies

Follow simple allocation rules we provide

Make sure both companies align properly



2. VAT Tracker (Key Responsibility)



Maintain a simple Google Sheet showing:

Rolling 12-month turnover

% of VAT threshold used

Monthly trend

Clearly highlight if we are getting close to the VAT threshold



???? I need to be able to glance at this and know where we are immediately



3. Monthly Summary

Send a short update:



What changed this month

Anything unusual

Any risks or actions needed (especially VAT-related)

Fortnightly (Every 2 Weeks)

15-minute video call (UK morning time)



We will review:



VAT tracker

current position vs threshold

anything that needs attention

How We Work

You stay on top of your work without needing to be chased

You communicate early if something is unclear or delayed

You attend scheduled calls on time

If something can’t be done on time, you let me know early

Requirements

2+ years hands-on Xero experience

Confident posting journal entries (not just categorising)

Understanding of UK VAT basics

Experience reconciling Stripe or similar systems

Good written and spoken English

Organised and proactive

Hours & Pay

8–10 hours per month

Long-term role

$8–$12/hour depending on experience



???? To Apply (Important)



Please record a short 1-minute video answering:



If one company pays for something that belongs to another company, how would you record it in Xero?

How would you track if a business is close to the VAT threshold?



Keep your answers simple and clear.



You can send your video via:



Loom

Google Drive (please make sure access is enabled)



Also include:



Your hourly rate

A brief example of a time you spotted a financial issue



Applications without a video will not be considered.



?? Final Note



If you are not confident with journal entries or VAT tracking, this role is probably not the right fit.
